Description: The true story of Sister Blandina Segale, a young and innocent nun sent by the Catholic Church to the western territories in 1872.

The earth is a rotting carcass of what it once was. Criminal syndicates have filled the power vacuum left by the absence of world governments. A robbery and some bad luck lead survivor and bandit J into hot water.

Dogman follows Tyler, a young man living with his best friend. After being fired from his first day at a new job, Tyler faces an ultimatum: pay rent or move out. Desperate, he enters a competition offering £100k to anyone who can outrun a dog for 10 minutes. But upon arrival, he realises he has unknowingly agreed to be hunted by something far more dangerous…
The International PPP Queen seeks new recruits in the USA.

A desperate immigrant is sent to Vancouver to recover a stolen watch. Meanwhile, two low-level gangsters search for the same watch to avoid being executed by their boss. Both groups fight for the same object that has the power to save their lives.

Film_title: And Now the Time Is Going
Description: A father and son explore their past, present, and future.

"Cold Read" we follow Bugs, a struggling actor desperate to prove to his girlfriend and the rest of the world that he has what it takes to achieve his dreams. But when fate comes knocking with an audition for a mysterious new project, will he be willing to go to the dark places the role requires?
During the World War II, a Japanese war major and his soldiers hunt down a woman and her children who are trying to escape Thailand to return home to Malaysia.

Film_title: Camille Solari: Hello New Zealand My Life In Pink
Description: Comedian, writer, director Camille Solari and her family pack up and move from LA to a rural town in New Zealand. This is her comedy special.

Suzanne, a young housewife isolated to her life on a farm and stuck in an abusive relationship with her husband, finds herself lured into the forest by a supernatural being and forced to face her deepest desires for escape.

Dev is struggling with lucid dreams that show him a strange reality where people that he knows in real life are haunting him. These dreams start predicting the future, and he starts losing a grip on reality. He must dive deeper to find out what the source of his dreams is as he uncovers the truth.

Two childhood best friends, Leo and Adam, must travel across the country to deliver a ring to Adam's boss who is a ruthless and powerful drug lord. The only problem is...the ring is stuck inside of the stomach of Leo's six and a half year old niece.

Film_title: A Christmas Snowed in with a Prince
Description: During a freak blizzard, a remote British lodge is shut down with just two guests: Ellie, a sarcastic travel blogger, and a handsome, overly polite guest who's definitely not from around here. Turns out, he's Prince Alaric, stranded while trying to escape royal duties. With only each other and no Wi-Fi, sparks (and snowballs) fly.
Featurette detailing the production of 'The Tripper'.
A grieving man turned vigilante stumbles upon the suspect of a robbery.

Film_title: Aliens in America: The Pascagoula Case
Description: In 1973, two Mississippi men claimed they were abducted by aliens while fishing on the Pascagoula River. The Pascagoula Case revisits this chilling case with new evidence, expert insight, and a story that still challenges belief half a century later.

Director: Bobby Peoples, Renee S. Warren Peoples
Description: Skylar works as a professional mistress hired by women for divorce leverage. When she finds herself falling for her target, Eric, she questions her career and her motives. But when Eric's wife, Octavia, won't allow Skylar to destroy her plans, and a dangerous game of cat and mouse ensues, with love and survival on the line.
Discreetest 2000 is a unique Zine and DVD Movie combination from UK artist Wade Radford that gently looks at the small existence of a nomadic couple, Taylor and Adam, at the turn of the millennium.
After exposing a comet conspiracy, astronomer Charley Codwell must redeem himself, uncover the truth, and stop mass hysteria before it's too late.

Hip-hop legend and hustler-turned-comedian Tip “T.I.” Harris is stepping into a whole new spotlight with his first-ever comedy special. From family drama to fame, and from the trap to the stage, nothing’s too wild (or too real) for T.I. to tackle. It’s raw. It’s unfiltered. And it’s funny as hell. Cheaper Than Therapy proves that sometimes the hardest-hitting lines aren’t in a verse—they’re in a joke.
A young couple on an ill-fated second date find themselves up against the elements and each other when they become stranded on a remote lake island.

In the summer of 2017, three people died in this house. This summer there will be more. New tenant Gibbs and former resident Alex must figure out why the walls creak, bugs infest the property - and who's next. Newly separated from his wife, Gibbs (Determan) rents a home where, in the summer of 2017, JJ Tyler (Harder) seemingly lost his mind after the death of this mother, Crystal Lake (O'Dea). By the time police arrived several bodies had piled up and rumors the house was haunted began circulating among the neighborhood children. Now, as noises within the walls increase nightly, and bugs infest the property inside and out, Gibbs reaches out to former resident Alex (Vanderhoef) to reveal why the house may have a "life" of its own.

Film_title: Theater in Quarantine: The Phantom of the Opera
Description: An ambitious young singer becomes the obsession of a monstrous creature lurking beneath the Paris Opera House. For ten performances over Halloween 2025, Theater in Quarantine livestreamed Phantom of the Opera from its New York City apartment studio, performed live and broadcast in real time.
What terrible tragedies realism inflicts on people
An abused college student experiences a sudden and significant change in her life, providing much-needed clarity in regard to her tormentor.
Follows Daniel's first 48 hours after rehab, as he adjusts back to his normal life while seeking forgiveness from the people in his past.
Mindbender is brought to you by JohnWix.net, Bubo TV, and the Phil Saw 22 Heavy Duty Retaliation Blade.

Film_title: The Last Days of an Escort
Description: Kitty, a struggling escort, agrees to be documented for a film. Her roommate, Star, a more successful escort, reluctantly joins. A new client, Earl, changes their lives forever when he asks to see Kitty and Star together. Kitty's world becomes increasingly dangerous as she navigates the dark underworld of escorting.

In a tumultuous college life marked by party drinking and fractured relationships, Noah struggles to reconcile his identity after a mysterious doppelganger emerges, leading him to confront the consequences of his reckless behavior and the emotional fallout from a devastating breakup.
Rebekah, a young girl occupied by her personal life and job, disregards a failing relationship with her grandmother, who she'll eventually have to feel the absence of and learn how to live without.
Ben Katzner performs at Sisyphus Brewing in Minneapolis.

A family heals during a river rafting trip a year after the passing of the dad but when young Grace rescues a wolf cub, she must reconcile her adoption abandonment issues as she prepares to surrender the beloved cub to wildlife authorities.

Film_title: Unveiled: Daisy Bates and Johnny Cash
Description: "Unveiled" celebrates the enduring legacies of two of Arkansas's most iconic figures. Daisy Bates, who courageously led the fight for civil rights, and Johnny Cash, whose music captured the soul of America, are immortalized in bronze in the U.S. Capitol’s National Statuary Hall. Explore the profound impact of their lives on history, from their humble beginnings to their lasting influence.
When one of the castmates of the reality TV show "Diva's Doing It" is found dead, the other women on the show become suspects.

Aaron Hawthorne, a down-on-his luck community theater director, sees an opportunity when a successful Broadway producer plans to mount an ambitious production of "A Christmas Carol" in his hometown. Aaron reunites his old troupe and attempts to put on a musical Christmas spectacular of his own, hoping he just might get the Broadway producer's attention and achieve the fame and success that's eluded him for years.
On Christmas Eve in the middle of nowhere two men meet an abandoned girl named Mary. Chris, Max must decide if she is a miracle or their curse.

A compilation of inspirational and insightful stories about how everyone deserves access to pools and safe places to swim, “When Everyone Swims” is the catalyst for a movement that sheds light on the often-overlooked intersection of swimming, public safety and social inequality.

Newly engaged lovers Jason and Brandon return to Los Angeles after two years in New York, where Brandon danced with the New York Ballet Company. Jason resumes work as a piano accompanist at a local ballet studio, while Brandon begins teaching ballet. Jason forms a powerful connection with a dancer, Devon, who seeks his help through the rumored magical healing power of his piano music. Brandon’s former abusive partner, Adam, reappears, still in love with him. Haunted by memories of a tragic family accident, Jason struggles to control his music’s power. As desire, magic, and past trauma collide, their love, commitment, and the people they care about are put to the ultimate test.

When two criminals target what appears to be an ordinary suburban home, they find themselves caught in a chaotic storm of betrayal, secrets, and deadly miscalculations. As a robbery turns into a hostage standoff, hidden affairs, drug ties, and a dark past unravel - revealing that the people they thought were victims may be more dangerous than they are. In a night filled with unexpected twists, loyalty is tested, blood is spilled, and survival is the only rule left standing.

Oscar. Tango. Hellwater. is a horror re-imagining of William Shakespeare's Othello. After losing his strongest employee to a gruesome bear attack, Ottoman Moore is forced to accept the help of a mysterious trio, led by Egon Carthwright, a travelling preacher. The newcomers arrived early for their duties of setting up the town fair in order to trap the murderous bear let loose by a sympathetic amuser from the town prior. Ottoman's life is slowly unraveled as he begins to suspect his wife Daisy of having an affair with one of his employees.
Oculus is an experimental short film reframing mental illness through and escape room of the mind.

Mikayla is a struggling hopeless romantic. When she meets Jalen, she thinks she's found the one, but he wants a possession over a partner. He demands her loyalty by asking her for a hit list of all of her ex-boyfriends to secure his love. Will she walk away? Or let her desperation consume her and fall into a deadly trap?
Following the events of Skepna's death, Mantiram makes his grand return. Ghanti and Friends must say goodbye to a bridge, trees, and stuff, prepare for war and make their final stand.
When two kids dare to watch a gruesome VHS slasher flick about a violent Jack o' Lantern killer called "The Carvening", it hits a little too close to home.
After being jilted at the altar, a young woman turns to a dating app for love—only to discover that her dream match may end up costing her life.
A young influencer finds her fate in the hands of an unknown stranger
It's the last night before college graduation, and Logan is determined to record it all. But as more chaos starts to descend, will he keep recording or learn to live in the moment?

SILENCE IN THE COURTROOM. It would be hard to find someone who disagrees that murder is wrong, but the truth is, there are people among us capable of such acts. Today, Judge Barbara will be handling such a case.

Film_title: Clayburn Cox: So Here's The Thing
Description: Clayburn Cox is a school teacher who hates corn. Revealing that to his students was both the biggest mistake and biggest opportunity. Hear his hilarious stories of never ending corn gifts along with one-liners and musical comedy. It's uproarious fun for everyone.

Young kid dragged into a life of crime by viciously corrupt politician and business man "Sebastian October". Tangled in a web of lies the protagonist "Dominic" does everything he can to live a normal life but keeps getting pulled back into the life he so desperately wants to leave.

After losing her job as a barista, Roni sets out to reinvent herself by starting a smoothie business. She recruits her well-meaning but clueless friends, Brett and Jared, to help make her dream a reality. But their ambitions spiral out of control when the trio stumbles upon the legendary Mr. Lime Cereal recipe. What begins as a simple venture quickly turns sour, leading to a tangled web of shady deals and moral compromises.
A struggling painter takes DMT to get over her artist block

Cast: Premiers Danseurs de l'Opéra National de Paris
Le Corps de Ballet de l'Opéra National de Paris
Le Junior Ballet de l’Opéra National de Paris
Description: King Florestan XIV invites all the fairies in the kingdom to the christening of his daughter Aurora. As they bestow beauty, generosity, and grace upon the princess, they are interrupted by the arrival of the horrible fairy Carabosse, who, furious at not having been invited to the festivities, casts a curse on Princess Aurora: on her 16th birthday, she will prick her finger and die. Recorded on April 7 and 10, 2025, at the Opéra Bastille in Paris's 12th arrondissement.

Two years ago, Nissa Arnson's infallible interpretation of the future was challenged for the first time, and she spared a man's life. Now she investigates a new adversary with fewer Rooks and far more to lose, while Will Augustine fears for his future and struggles to maintain his integrity as an Alterer. As their paths cross again, long-hidden and terrifying secrets begin to come to light.
Television for the AI age.

Eleven-year-old friends Sam and Lucas embark on a quest to find "magical mushrooms", upon overhearing their uncle talk about the psychedelic wonders of the drug of the same name. Venturing through imagined forests and caves, they encounter a series of obstacles including a red-cloaked bogeyman. After finding the mushrooms in all their ethereality, they return home to a surreal twist: bright red toadstools seemingly growing from the floorboards.
Elderly lady Anna travels to town alone to see her son's film on Christmas Eve.

Hotel Attack is a relentless thriller about a criminal named Hawk The Killer, a ruthless murderer terrorizing an entire town (Greenfield) His main targets are a group of friends (The Exterminators) that live in the town of Greenfield. Nathan Xanders, Scotty jones, and Julian Miller plan to stop hawk for good.

Director: Pepa Català Fombuena, Adrià Pagès Molina
Description: "What was there before life?" a child asks his mother. The answer is a story. A story the mother tells, illustrated with a series of beautiful and deliberately imperfect prints. And between its cracks, those of the landscapes and images, life emerges. After "They Only Thrown Away," Adrià Pagès and Pepa Catalá move into short form with a fable that is also an ode to motherhood.

The Death Park Killer's body vanishes from the morgue, sparking new murders. Chloe leads bounty hunters after the $50k reward, while survivors Hunter, Willie, and Shady return to end the terror once and for all.
A trio of robbers’ plan unravels when a young woman leaves her 3-month-old baby on the father’s doorstep. Inspired by true events.

We invite you to speculate about the far far future of The Internet and World Wide Web. Not the Past or Present, but what the Internet could be. We want you to speculate about the future of this medium of communication, what form does it take? Does it even exist? Or can we even perceive it? We are at a threshold, there are many possible timelines, so lets speculate. Create the future you dream, the future you fear or the future that we may not expect. Create the future of the internet. With abundance.

Film_title: Kura Forrester: Here If You Need
Description: Kura Forrester, Billy T Winner, Taskmaster alum, Shortland Street fave and local legend, is bringing back her critically acclaimed show Here If You Need for a one-off performance.

Film_title: No Dress Rehearsal: Behind the Scenes
Description: Behind the scenes of 2024's The Tragically Hip: No Dress Rehearsal. Along with never-aired outtakes and other unseen footage, the screening includes a rare big-screen presentation of some of the Hip’s most iconic music videos.
Mitch is a roadie who is trying to find his legendary father.

Sindhu Vee - ALPHABET In her deeply personal stand-up special ALPHABET, Sindhu Vee explores being a parent (to kids who really haven't turned out how she had expected), being married (to a great communicator), being a sister (to someone waaay cooler than her) and being a child (who has lost her beloved mother). Vee also considers other serious topics: the hair we want, the friends we have, and what exactly makes a balloon fancy?

Jasmine is a hard-working stripper, struggling to make ends meet for herself and her son, Lil Jay, while trying to maintain a semblance of stability in their chaotic life. Her boyfriend, Mozzy, is wrongfully accused of a crime he didn't commit, further adding to the financial and emotional strain. Despite their challenges, Lil Jay is a kid with a good heart, trying to stay on the right path despite the turbulent environment around him.
A time capsule by Joel Warren, originally intended to be a narrative feature.

Film_title: Laurie Anderson Saint Joan of Arc Basilica, Paris
Description: In the inspiring setting of a deconsecrated Parisian church, iconic experimental artist Laurie Anderson performs a new private concert. A timeless, spellbinding and elegant interlude.
Restless husband Larry enters online adult entertainment, triggering guilt and paranoia that unravel his family as buried secrets come to light.

Steve Steinman’s Vampires Rock trilogy continues with Eternal Love, the new hilarious rock musical. Join Steve Steinman and his incredible cast as they take you on an epic journey into a fantastical, dark thrilling world filled with Vampires, where the love-struck Vampire Baron searches for eternal love and takes his new bride.
After turning his life around and following the death of his ex-wife, a father decides to make amends to the daughter he hasn't seen for almost eight years.

Ryan Davis returns with his latest stand-up special, Under-Rated — his YouTube debut and a fearless, hilarious set exclusively on Ali Siddiq’s channel. From personal stories to cultural hot takes, Ryan delivers punchlines that hit hard and moments you won’t forget.
The rise and fall of late 80's hard rock / "hair band", Boy Elroy.
SEEING IS BELIEVING
A group of friends investigate the strange disappearances within Moore Hall.

Two brothers, Owen and Ethan Carter, thought they had their lives figured out. Owen is on the verge of adulthood—ready to graduate high school and head off to college. Ethan, just thirteen, is preparing for the start of his middle school journey. But their plans come crashing down when they are falsely accused of a brutal murder that shakes their small town to its core. Forced to flee the only home they've ever known, the boys must rely on each other as they navigate betrayal, fear, and the growing rage of a town determined to see them brought to justice. As the manhunt intensifies, the truth begins to surface—but will it be too late to save them?

Dani is a 23-year-old virgin on a mission to finally "do it", but her plans get squashed when she finds out she has a yeast infection. Convinced that losing her virginity is what she needs to move forward in life, she sets out to rid herself of the infection with the support of her best friend Jo. Dani begins a journey of fixing her vagina and finding someone who'd like to get inside it, all while battling pressures from her parents to find a nice Jewish boy, and her cool sisters who are a constant reminder of everything she has yet to achieve.
Comedian Pink Foxx takes to the stage for her latest stand-up comedy special

An anthology that presents 13 short films born from a one-day Rainbopedia workshop, showcasing the breadth of queer life. From Leon, a trans photographer shaping political art, to Mark, who unravels his father’s chance encounter with Noël Coward; Carol’s vivid memories of LA’s punk and leather bar scene; and performance artist John Fleck’s irreverent self-portrait after being targeted by Senator Jesse Helms—these voices are at once touching, funny, provocative, and profound. Together, they offer a layered portrait of queer experience while inviting audiences to share their own stories for Rainbopedia’s global LGBTQ+ archive.

The Feeling Remains is a haunting and profoundly personal documentary that plunges deep into the fractured heart of a family torn apart by trauma. With a blend of 16mm film and evocative home videos, it weaves a delicate yet powerful tapestry of past and present, unraveling the intricate and fragile threads of memory and storytelling. Through each family member’s fragmented perspective, it embarks on a relentless search for an elusive truth, navigating the shadowy terrain where reality and recollection blur. The film unveils a poignant meditation on the enduring impact of trauma, the complexities of understanding, and the painful yet necessary journey toward reconciliation with the past.

Counter embarks on a series of wilderness expeditions that task Sylas Grove with performing live electronic music inspired by extreme environments. Composed of five distinct sets that are equal parts introspective performance art and expeditionary feat, BIOMES contrasts Sylas’ meditative, digital expression with our world’s natural visual spectacle. Traversing a lush redwood forest, stalactite-dotted cavern, snow-capped mountaintop, and vibrant Aztec sandstone mesa, all culminating in a pure white snowstorm, the Counter crew invites you to explore electronica.

Film_title: Hommage to Oum Kalthoum Paris Philharmonic
Cast: Orchestre de musique arabe de l'Opéra du Caire
Description: Conducted by Alaa Abdelsalam and accompanied by singers Rehab Omar and Eman Abdel-Ghani, the Cairo Opera Arab Music Orchestra celebrates Oum Kalthoum.
A prospector and his son battle vengeful bandits over a disputed claim during the California Gold Rush.
In a land where sexuality can mean life or death, a refugee girl must become someone else to survive.

Enigmatic devices shatter five timelines, altering the lives of Steve, Ray, Verona, Oakley, Xiomara, Mitch, and Dominica. As chaos spreads, they're forced to rise, facing the unknown to reclaim their futures-and stop what's coming.
Comedy legend Colin Mochrie teams with master hypnotist Asad Mecci for HYPROV: Improv Under Hypnosis, where audience members are hypnotized into becoming fearless, laugh-out-loud improv superstars.
Children of Black Power activists reflect on their upbringing, exploring how their parents’ revolutionary spirit shaped their lives, identities, and enduring fight against injustice.
moi.digital untitled volume titled: conglomerate (02022024-12112024) london collection of untitled episodes from the creation of the conglomerate album
Shanta Sapkota, a courageous Nepali woman, leads an all-female team fighting to stop the trafficking of young women across the India-Nepal border.
A depressed 28 year-old reconnects with his estranged family and comes to terms with the loss of his father.

Tamunoba the goddess appears to Ibanichuka a carefree warrior and against the norm pronounces him the king of Okrika. In a cryptic warning, the goddess advises him to show true strength in the face of his greatest adversary in order to save his people from annihilation. His interpretation of her message leads to conquests, alliances and even a civil war with an influential member of his war cabinet, all these while trying to unite a people already divided by the Christian religion led by the wily Chief Ogan wielding his own supremacist agenda. When Ibanichuka eventually discovers his greatest adversary, he realizes to his shock that he had been on a wrong trajectory after all and is forced to make the decision that no true warrior should ever make.
New father Adam visits his estranged dad, Paul, in a bid to reconcile a painful past. But as buried memories and resentments surface, the day spirals into a raw confrontation neither is ready for.
In a world where racism is reversed a white teenager navigates through the harsh reality of discrimination.
An aspiring Cult Leader struggles to recruit followers for his cosmic religion, but finds some success when he manages to lure a few drifters in.
Set in 1970s Lucknow, this poignant tale explores unconditional maternal love amidst societal challenges.
A young woman returns to the mountain where her family spent their childhood summers in search of the sister that only she can remember.
A Mars documentary that presents the evidence for water, life, pyramids, ruins, UFOs, and global cataclysm that turned a blue planet red.
Taking place 20 years after the events of Aliens (86): An elite team of marines embark on a mission that leads them to their doom.
He travels back in time ten years to meet his younger self and give him a message. A message that is of tremendous importance for his future life!

Film_title: Off Book: The Improvised Holiday Musical - The Tale of Moby Wick
Description: Jessica McKenna and Zach Reino create a completely improvised musical in an attempt to combat the notion that musicals should be “carefully crafted” or “thought out at all.”
In his hysterical sophomore comedy special, comedian Ryan Rogers tackles homophobia, same-sex marriage, addiction, and so much more.

If you love musicals, you might love this. If you hate musicals, you might love this. Fontanelle is part stand-up comedy, part musical theatre - a chaotic, dark exploration of vulnerability, irony and tragedy, set against the never-ending cultural fascination with the Titanic.

A dark comedic caper centred around a community of barflies at a Hamilton dive bar. When the patrons get word that Foggy, one of the bar’s regulars, is on the run with a fanny pack full of money, they each scheme, backstab and claw at one another to be the first person to find Foggy and take the money.

Director: Kryzz Gautier, Frédéric Rosset et al
Description: Two lovers in the midst of a breakup discuss which memories to keep and which to erase, a young couple finds their relationship tested when a national crisis forces them indoors together, and a Japanese citizen grapples with the demands of the immigration office so that she may stay with her wife in France. Delve into a broken future with 5 bittersweet tales of lost connections and new beginnings.

A man in his early 30s, living with Asperger's syndrome and trying to navigate where he wants to be in life, falls into a romantic relationship that challenges him to work on areas he needs improvement on.

A middle-aged woman (Robin), after the presumed death of her father, faces multiple versions of herself as memories of an unknown childhood reveal themselves. Trapped in her father’s house, a slow uncovering of events lost in her mind begin to spill out as we, the audience, lose track of what's real and what is not.

A bucolic fantasy frolic in which an adaptable young woman must navigate a bewildering and whimsical phantasmagoria, populated by anthropomorphic and bombastic creatures. The characters she encounters, she discovers, reject established facts and knowledge in favour of: galvanising, albeit meaningless soundbites (often in the form of riddles and poetry), vigilantism and its blunt implementation of “justice” and cult-like acts of dissent. Ironically, leading these academic rebellions are the establishment figures themselves.
The Devil deals with becoming a father.
Simulating an alternate future in which a small family's matriarch embarks on a quest to forge a powerful tool for her wayward daughter.

Film_title: The Path of Titans Movie 3 - WAR FOR GONDWA
Description: The Guardians of Gondwa must restore balance to their home before it's too late. In this grand conclusion to the trilogy, will unification or extinction prevail?

We follow JASON TODD after he has retired from being the RED HOOD after TWO years of being active. The story explores the circumstances and events that bring Jason back into contact and good alignment with the "BAT-FAMILY". The narrative builds towards a significant conflict involving one of Gotham's most prominent criminals; BLACK MASK, who hires the infamous Mercenary known as RED X to kidnap his newfound friend- Sheila Conway. Luring Jason out of hiding…

Celebrate Kristofferson in a 2016 concert featuring a multigenerational “Who’s Who” of country greats, including Dierks Bentley, Rosanne Cash, Eric Church, Emmylou Harris, Jamey Johnson, Alison Krauss, Lady A, Martina McBride, Reba McEntire, Willie Nelson, Jennifer Nettles, Darius Rucker and Hank Williams Jr. Go backstage for interviews with the artists who explore his enduring influence.

When Chan Nari, a devoted mother and wife, visits her parents’ newly purchased home in a remote Cambodian province, she senses something is deeply wrong. The house, eerily shaped like a triangle, seems to whisper secrets of an unsettling past. As strange occurrences begin to plague her family—shadows shifting in the corners, whispers in the night—Nari encounters a mysterious woman who warns her that the land is cursed. At first, Nari dismisses the warnings, but her skepticism turns to terror when she begins witnessing horrifying visions and unexplainable phenomena. Desperate for answers, she digs into the house’s history, uncovering a long-forgotten cult that once worshipped a dark deity. As the sinister presence tightens its grip, Nari realizes she has been marked—chosen for a ritual that demands her soul.
Sixteen video artists offer a feature-length re-imagining of Jaws on its 50th anniversary.
Comedian Eli Yudin (Dropout, Cracked) talks about balding, being adopted, and the meaning behind his weird name in his debut comedy special. Live from Brooklyn, NY.

Two best friends, Aaron and Dom, are trying to find their way through life in college, each with their own difficulties and struggles. The film follows their changing relationship from an optimistic beginning to an uncertain end.
An amateur thief recruits two unsuspecting high schoolers to join his moving company as a coverup for his elaborate but outrageous heists.
Photojournalist Ese arrives in Ibeshe to find her missing sister and uncovers a journal leading to a dark mystery involving supernatural forces and a ritual killing ring.
An emotional journey following close friends Mathew and Justin. Justin dealing the confrontation of his future, as Mathew is struggling to help him believe his life is worth living.
Vic and Taylor, two flatmates, desperately try to evict their annoying roommate, Salem, who isn't what meets the eye.
Studios: Victoria University of Wellington - Film Production Society

Description: IT’S UP TO US is a new documentary film about the history of racism in America.
Four high school students end up lost in the woods during a senior-year field trip.

Tosin Shina, a glamorous Lagos socialite and nightclub owner, sees her perfect life shatter when her husband is arrested as a top drug trafficker. With her wealth gone and children to protect, she’s forced to rebuild. But when a deadly cartel demands she take over her husband’s operations, Tosin must navigate crime, betrayal, and survival—or lose everything.

When Colby Daniels stumbles across a broken time machine, he accidentally lets 5 displaced people from across time into his neighborhood. When a mysterious Time Traveler with knowledge of the future appears, Colby must find a way to keep everyone contained and hidden.
A theatrical event like no other, brought to life by RMC

A quiet little police chowki in a remote village in Tripura is shaken with the discovery of dismembered body parts scattered and displayed around the village, mimicking the iconography of the Tripuri deity, Baba Garia.
The single channel video of Richard Prince's second court-ordered deposition in a copyright infringement lawsuit.
Allen returns home to help his father, Oscar, recover from a stroke, all while mending their strained relationship and reviving the family dry cleaning business.

Diagnosed with a rare disease, a teenager struggles to hold onto his identity as his memories fade. Pushing away the people he needs the most, he goes through a journey of grieving himself and what he used to know. Learning the hard way that the present is all he has left, and that in some peculiar way, this can be a gift in our society.

FOUR is an experimental film that abstracts and transforms archival footage to explore themes of memory, time, and identity. Through a process of visual fragmentation and distortion, the film interrogates the ephemeral nature of pornography reframing the profane to the profound.
after causing irreversible damage to the universe, marc and steven have to figure out how to reverse it

Marcus Surgeons has the ability to allow the spirits of the recently deceased to enter his body in order to obtain closure before moving on. He does this for financial gain, leaving his body, soul, and spirit open to an unwelcome entity with a hidden agenda.
A lawyer faces ancestral violence and haunting memories in a California farmhouse, exploring guilt and redemption.

Director: Joost van den Bosch, Erik Verkerk
Description: Bridget is a gifted young girl with a big secret: she has a pet crocodile, Gilbert, that she hides in her room. However, no matter how sweet, the little crocodile grows bigger and more difficult to care for. What to do when your parents don’t like pets, and your father, who owns a shoe store, loves crocodile leather? With the help of Grandma Nell, the duo set out on a wild adventure to find the perfect home for Gilbert.
A couple’s quest for passion sparks a dangerous threesome igniting desire, deceit, and a deadly twist.
In the woods
In the early hours of 31 August 1997, Diana, Princess of Wales died from injuries sustained in a car crash in Paris, France. The world would brace itself for what was to come.
An exploration of what it means to be unfelt.
A hard-partying group of friends in the Irish midlands ineptly investigate when a mysterious figure from their past seeks revenge.
A vengeful former resident returns to peaceful Hinkley, Indiana. High school seniors plan their last party in the woods. Their paths cross, leading to bloodshed. Who will make it out alive?

A female attorney who works at a family law firm, and is also a ballroom dancer, is handed a case where a happily married Christian couple is all of a sudden getting a divorce. The husband doesn't want his wife to leave and his family to split up, and he doesn't know why she is leaving as she won't give him a reason. The attorney tries to figure out what is happening and why, with the end goal of hoping to save the marriage. This movie has a message for a married man, a married woman, and a single person regardless if your age is 20 or 60. It also shares the gospel and has a message on the power of Christ! The movie also presents an analogy of how ballroom dance is a picture of marriage.
Orlando Gets a Call from the President, who says he's going to end the world due to humanity failing as a species. After the Call, he then talks to a stranger
After the events of Nick Eh 30: The Movie, Nick is forced out of hiding after Ninja is assassinated at the game awards.
Ian Levine's AI construction of an unproduced serial for season twenty-three of Doctor Who.

Sarah and Manon, two videographers from Paris and fans of URBEX (the illegal practice of exploring and filming abandoned places that are off-limits and hidden), set out to explore an abandoned castle for their YouTube channel. To their horror, they will discover that a disturbed and frightening family seems to still inhabit the place, turning their exploration into a true nightmare.

After a heist goes completely wrong, the remaining crew members barge into a suburban home trying to figure out a way to escape from the growing police force outside, whilst trying to discover and eliminate the police mole among their ranks.

Two friends from the year 2200 attempt to cheat on a math test with a high-tech calculator, only to find themselves faced with a problem no amount of studying could prepare them for: getting stranded in 2025.
Twenty five years old and unemployed, Jesper goes for a night out alone and navigates his way through Sydney's city nightlife with the hope of getting laid.
Two missions taking place simultaneously in different decades where both C.I.S. Agents going under the alias Clank went up against the dangerous crime lord known as Goldscar.

Ever wondered what an in-world podcast from the Ninjago universe would sound like? Wonder no longer! Get ready for Crosstalk, a delightful new podcast series set in the Crossroads and hosted by beloved fan favorites, Kreel and Lobbo.
Four recent college grads go on a month-long roadtrip across America. With an unbridled sense of freedom, they capture their experiences and the people they meet along the way.
A short documentary raising awareness surrounding Clare's Law; if your partner has a history of violent or abusive behaviour, you have the right to be told.

PNG's independence 50 years ago came against all odds. One of the most culturally diverse lands on earth, this is the story of the leaders who united tribes and the role of colonial Australia in the birth of a nation.
Professor Toad repeatedly attempts and fails to confess his love to his friend T. Ode, and each setback pushes him into an increasingly destructive spiral.

A Pianist uses the music of piano to remember the past memories of romance he once formed with that of a girl in college. Together they go through the good and the bad and both discover parts of themselves they never knew.

Film_title: The Adventures Of The Abridged Founders'
Description: Things get weird when two would-be founders try to start a new civilization, because building a great society kind of stinks.

In the aftermath of his father’s passing, Jake tries to lean on his remaining family for support, only to be repeatedly turned away. In the midst of their spiralling relationships, the family dog mysteriously disappears. While looking for his dog, Jake discovers something darker within the woods. Something that is a lot closer to home than he thinks. Something hungry.

The footage in this movie was captured, without any intended purpose, between the years of 2008 and 2023 when the filmmaker visited her childhood home in Mentor, Ohio, a town that sits along the shores of the Great Lake Erie. Shot instinctively, haphazardly, gloriously with whatever devices were on hand, most notably multiple BlackBerry phones and a FUJIFILM X-T200, this kaleidoscopic film (perhaps) seeks to find out what Iris Murdoch meant when she wrote: “Time, like the sea, unties all knots.”

A mischievous boy opens a mysterious parcel from Chernobyl, Russia, advertising that children can raise their own insect family. As playful as it seems, this package contains a sinister secret that turns your ordinary home into a battleground for a horrible infestation.

Film_title: My Christmas Valentine: I Forgot Christmas!
Description: Everyone in the town of Yuletide, Arizona celebrates Christmas year-round. Everyone, that is, except town scrooge Penelope Roche Duplossier. But when a freak coconut bonking accident on New Year’s Eve wipes Penelope’s memory of Christmas, a local reporter helps her discover the true magic of the season.

When their small country school faces closure, country kids use whatever means necessary to save it while their older siblings do the same to keep their sacred lands during the historic NZ Aotearoa land protests of 1978.

Medusa, an iconic symbol of tragedy and transformation, captivates with her stone-turning gaze. A viral sculpture disrupts traditional portrayals, sparking societal reflection. One of the most body modified trans people in the world, Tiamat Legion Medusa shares their healing journey, while a diverse chorus of voices examines Medusa's myth. Celebrating her transformative power, this documentary invites audiences to redefine Medusa's narrative.
Employees working the night shift at a gas station disappear one by one.
New Comedy Special 'Little Aussie Battler'. Filmed at the Newcastle Comedy Club, NSW, Australia.
After a traumatic accident, Alex West discovers an abduction in a remote cabin, but as she investigates, her own past and blurred memories make her an unreliable witness.
The stories of 8 individuals & the lasting impact the late Kobe Bryant had on their lives.
Self love in all of us
When a surfer finds a mysterious briefcase in the dunes, he embarks on a violent journey to the depths of hell.
High action movie, based on a teenage boy in a world during an apocalyptic event, where everybody is a vegan in a vegan world.
Struggling to make ends meet in their day-to-day life, five young men decide to take to the stage to get their finances to align with their needs.
Three brothers fight to win their father's inheritance.
Two old friends have a chance meeting right before a server is shut down.
ISOxo joins forces with Skrillex for a monumental 90-minute set at Niteharts Festival.
The antagonistic relationship of a quietly dissatisfied rural Victorian couple attracts the attention of a malevolent primeval entity, with disastrous results.

Using the soundtracks of disaster movies as material, A Disaster is an almost entirely imageless film; comprised of sound and text, it is centered on the physical comprehension of subsonic frequencies, tactile sound, and how experiences of sonic violence mirror the relentless ubiquity of ableism.
Told through someone’s laptop screen, Richie Clark quickly descends into madness after he’s rejected by a girl and her friends at a party.

In the heart of the extraordinary Bialowieza primeval forest in Poland, the last in Europe, artists Katarzyna Kot and Stéphane Guiran meet scientists, women healers and inspiring local people. They discover the wounds of its inhabitants, the heeling dimension of the forest, converse with its whispers, and question our way of being among the living. In resonance with the forest, with the help of local residents and other artist-musicians, they compose a vibrant tribute to this Great Living Being.

Kurt Oberhaus, Michael Joseph Pierce, Mohamed Hakeemshady, Bella Dontine, and Gabriela Kostadinova in A Lion's Game (2025) Facing a crippling company debt and a looming deadline from a ruthless loan shark, corporate executive Autumn Bennett's desperate scramble for a solution spirals into a whirlwind of greed and betrayal, threatening the world she's built and the relationships she values.
When a crew plans an armored truck heist in 1996 Detroit, their backgrounds and motives are revealed while they execute the heist and are pursued by law enforcement.
Sonic Youth in 1991 on Neil Young's Smell the Horse tour, captured by Crazy Horse Guitar/Bass Tech Mondo aka Armando Garcia.
A man, plagued by the inability to consume food or drink, embarks on a profound journey into the depths of his psyche.

Three generation of Nigeria family with a reputable cocoa dynasty in all regions of the country: At the center is the inconsequent dissonance between the family. The fate of their inheritance after the pass of the matriarch depends on UNITY.
A man with an extraordinary but failing memory tries to solve the mystery of what happened to a woman killed by a hit-and-run driver.

In peaceful Taigasville, the Puffins enjoy carefree days filled with arctic games, and even lazy Otto Von Walrus loves his picnics. But when a surprise snowstorm strikes, the Puffins must rally together to save their world. Otto included.

Kai's life is predicted to end in 3 days. He questions his legacy and meaning after an oracle informs him of his imminent death. Racing the clock, Kai prioritizes what matters most before his foretold demise.

When a runaway thinks she has been found out she is forced to leave a life and a person that she realizes she has gotten way too close to. When she tries to leave everything behind like she has done many times before, she has to fight the fact that this time she wants to stay and can’t move on so easily. As she embarks on the journey to her new life, she is haunted by the memories she is trying to forget, while trying to cling on to who she has become

Nobody enjoys being in debt, financial or otherwise, but August Strindberg’s 1888 play – which the author ranked as his finest achievement – plays with masterly skill on the themes of emotional debit and credit to create a situation as painfully enjoyable for the audience as it is nightmarish for the protagonists.

She’s a free-spirited travel show host. He’s her buttoned-up boyfriend. Together, they’re in for the wildest trip of their lives. An American Abroad is a jet-setting romantic comedy that spans Greece, Africa, Amsterdam, and more, as Marcia and Arnold try to keep their relationship on track while navigating psychic readings, shark dives, and a wine-fueled Minister’s License. As the cameras roll and the crew starts to lose it, the real question becomes: is love worth the chaos?

Film_title: The Average Adventure Of A Psychomaniac Cat
Description: An average psychomaniac calico cat named Bella has to go through an absolutely insane adventure to not get into the clutches of the mysterious villain, Gloved Hand.
Hayden has taken over his dead father’s fishing business. With the company facing bankruptcy, he agrees to dump a dead body in the ocean for a few thousand dollars.

Struggling to launch her social media career, Elise decides to switch to viral pranks. When one prank on an old acquaintance goes terribly wrong, a local gang leader is out for revenge. With her best friend's help, Elise must fight for her life to survive.

On the eve of the 2025 championships, here is a chance to relive 2024’s Wimbledon, which saw a familiar face win the men’s singles and a surprise in the women’s event. It was also the year when Andy Murray waved goodbye to the All England Club with a memorable Centre Court send-off.
Studios: The All England Lawn Tennis Club

Film_title: Metallica: On the Air (Music Videos + TV Appearances)
Description: MUSIC VIDEOS Until It Sleeps (Official Music Video) Hero of the Day (Director’s Cut) Mama Said (Official Music Video) King Nothing (Official Music Video) Hero of the Day (U.S. Version) Hero of the Day (U.K. Version) Hero of the Day (Cowboy Footage) MTV MOTHERLOAD MTV Motherload (U.S. Version) MTV Motherload (Euro Version) TV APPEARANCES Until It Sleeps (Live on the MTV Video Music Awards) Hero of the Day (Live on Top of the Pops) Wasting My Hate (Live on Later…with Jools Holland) Mama Said (Live on Later…with Jools Holland) King Nothing (Live on Later…with Jools Holland) Last Caress / So What (Live on the MTV Europe Music Awards) Mama Said (Live on Sverige-Sovjet) King Nothing (Live on the American Music Awards)

After starting their new record label, Donica Blair and Shequell Harris have entered a dangerous arena full of guns, lies, and deceit. Now they are racing against time to right their wrongs and save their own lives before they are next in a string of murders. Meanwhile their partner Seven, has fallen victim to the deadliest of them all; the Black widow.
Submitted to the Film Development Council of the Philippines for iAnimate Animation Film Festival 2025.

Director: Stuart Hynson Culpepper, Karin Diann Williams
Description: Skateboarding kids unite to rescue a cat shelter by creating viral videos of the felines. 11-year-old Rennie leads the charge, with the mission to find homes for adult cats. Challenges arise as they race against the clock.

In the heart of the Randstad lies a unique part of the Netherlands: Máximapark. Just 25 years ago, populated by horticulturalists, it is now a vibrant, green icon of modern landscape architecture and community spirit.
Single mom Kate is contemplating leaving the floundering small-town family business behind for the big-city life when she finds romance in an unlikely source in her hometown.
Cultures collide in a beachside college town when the lives of a surfer and a nerd intertwine. Together the step-brothers must navigate romance, finals, and a surf cult.
A year after a brutal streak of murders in a small New England town, Jeff Beesley is on the run from not only the killer, but also the police.

Carmen, a determined mother, fights to reclaim her stolen child from her ruthless arms-dealer boyfriend. Navigating deceit and danger, she manipulates allies and charms powerful men in this gripping tale of unwavering love and action.
Scored by Girl Talk and produced by Junk Food Dinner, NIGHT RIPPER is a visual essay about a different time and place.

Film_title: Man With a Movie Camera: The Found Footage Legacy of 'Man Bites Dog'
Director: Sarah Appleton, Jim Kunz et al
Description: Documentary by filmmaker Sarah Appleton.
A master thief and an aspiring novelist comb the Virginian countryside in search of a legendary treasure.

A dreamy, experimental documentary exploring the legacy of British colonialism in Mauritius and the Chagos Islands. It traces two constitutional challenges to colonial-era sodomy laws and the ongoing fight of displaced Chagossians to return home. As the criminalisation of LGBTQ+ lives collides with climate injustice and contested sovereignty, the film reveals how imperial power continues to shape legal systems, identities, and land rights. A haunting meditation on queer struggle, forced displacement, and the unfinished business of decolonisation.

Jack is a small-time criminal who'se dream of becoming a professional athlete were shattered by a savage beating. 10 years after this aggression, his younger brother is shot dead by racist cops, he must come to terms with his life, and how to cope with police brutality.
When she brings home an electronic baby for a sex-ed project, she is thrilled to feel like an adult. But “the baby project,” designed to deter teenage pregnancy, is not that simple.
Mary Berry celebrates Christmas traditions, including delicious food, Christmas lights, carols and picking the Christmas tree, with Alison Steadman, Harry Aikines-Aryeetey and Zoe Ball.

After a passionate night between Shea Lacy and Ian Jurd, Shea's sister, Gigi Lacy, impersonates her as Ian's one-night stand partner. Six years later, Shea becomes Ian's legal counsel, and over time, they fall in love. Fearing that Shea might take her place as Ian's lover, Gigi frequently attempts to sabotage their relationship. However, Ian always intervenes just in time, preventing Shea from suffering any harm or misunderstanding.

Three brilliant minds unite to crack a code that could revolutionize medicine: Parker Rose, the ambitious mastermind; Avery Lions, the talented newcomer; and Jesse Wilkins, the loyal friend caught in the middle. Their breakthrough promises to save countless lives, but as fame and fortune beckon, so do the shadows of greed and betrayal. Three young lives are forever changed, each forced to grapple with the true cost of ambition, loyalty, and the blurred lines between right and wrong in a world where a single line of code can alter the course of history.

Joseph Shema, an orphan with a traumatic past attempts to make up for his horrible childhood by adopting a child to offer them the love he never got. But everything turns upsidedown when he gets stuck in a dream and has to find a way out before he gets lost in it forver.
After a hangout gone wrong, a group of friends gather to save one of their own from the clutches of The Necromancer.

A routine beer delivery becomes a citywide collapse. Ignored by traffic, a frustrated driver snaps, abandoning his route and spiraling into violence. Motorcycles, police cruisers, and helicopters become tools in a personal war against a world that refused to move. But even after the smoke clears, there's no triumph, only escape, silence, and a final, fatal toast.
A successful Black woman's life spirals after a violent betrayal shatters her inner circle-forcing her to confront buried secrets, shifting loyalties, and a past that refuses to stay silent.

A thief on the verge of self ruin gets his life thrown upside down when his paths cross with a professional organization. 'Sharks' is a black-and-white neo-noir drama-thriller about a man on the margins of society who becomes ensnared in a criminal underworld. What begins as petty theft spirals into a deadly moral unraveling.

Acclaimed stand up comic Clay Horwitz embarks on a culinary adventure of New York City, bringing the funniest comedians to try the most iconic restaurants & hidden gem food spots in the city. Hilarity and deliciousness ensue.
A young woman with schizophrenia and addiction embraces a fresh start at college, but her stability shatters when her vital medication disappears.
When three childhood friends fall into a love triangle, they run into events that almost destroy their long-time friendship.

Jacob has kept his childhood trauma a secret from his wife until today, when he surprises her with a nighttime trip through a cemetery to confront the grave of his recently-deceased childhood bully. What begins as a difficult journey into the past becomes an unexpected opportunity for catharsis, connection, and, of course, childish revenge.
A witch rips a man from sleep

A family’s trip to rural Arkansas takes a sinister turn when they stumble upon a backwoods revival unlike any other. What begins as a curious glimpse into small-town faith soon spirals into chaos as devotion turns violent and belief gives way to bloodshed. Trapped among zealots who see salvation in sacrifice, the family must confront a terrifying force that blurs the line between the divine and the demonic. In this haunting descent into madness, faith, fear, and fanaticism fuse into unrelenting horror.

Director: Bobby Peoples, Renee S. Warren Peoples
Description: A doting housewife, by all appearances, conducting a fiery affair finds herself iced out when her lover's wife is diagnosed with a serious illness.

A poetic portrait of Albie Sachs, anti-apartheid icon and constitutional court judge, whose experiences under the apartheid regime and visionary ideals helped forge South Africa’s path to justice and transformation.
Phil grapples with the fallout of infidelity and seeks redemption coaching little league football, where personal struggles matter more than the game.
Seven women embark on a transformative weekend in Sedona, Arizona, forging bonds and finding inner strength through shared struggles and secrets.

Bloxyvision Song Contest is a virtual singing competition. On July 12th 2025, the grand final of the 2025 edition of the contest was held. Watch entries from 16 different countries compete for the number 1 spot.

Jay, a cynical womanizer, bets his friend he can make his fiancée cheat before their wedding. Confident in his charm, he sets out to seduce her, unaware of the emotional turmoil he'll cause. As his plan spirals, Jay faces the consequences of his actions and the possibility of redemption.

Film_title: NEVERMORE - The Imaginary Life & Mysterious Death of Edgar Allan Poe
Description: Delightfully dark, heartbreakingly comic, and playfully grotesque, NEVERMORE – The Imaginary Life & Mysterious Death of Edgar Allan Poe is a whimsical and chilling musical fairytale for adults journeying through the life of one of literature’s most prolific figures. Bizarrely beautiful and wonderfully witty, NEVERMORE uses haunting song, poetic storytelling and surreal imagery to explore the events that shaped Poe’s career and ignited his lifelong battle with “visions dark and sinister.”

Film_title: Two Projectors & A Barrel Full of Monkeys
Description: "Two Projectors & A Barrel Full of Monkeys" calls to attention the machinery that will make film loops accessible to the audience and the projectionist. A barrel roll is a flight maneuver in which an airplane makes a complete rotation on its longitudinal axis while approximately maintaining its original direction. Meanwhile, maneuvers are possible actions given the materials at hand.

Film_title: Puppet Master Axis of Evil | Noir Version | Introduction by Charles Band
Description: The retro wave of PUPPET MASTER "Axis" films began HERE and this time, you can watch it real deal retro NOIR! In a stateside hotel during the height of World War II, young Danny dreams of joining the war effort. Following the murder of hotel guest Mr. Toulon by Nazi assassins, Danny finds the old man's crate of mysterious puppets and is suddenly thrust into a battle all his own. It is up to Danny and the living deadly Puppets to stop this axis of evil..
A legendary Manhattan power broker, fed up with the hungry factions that surround him, tries to navigate the introduction of a new theoretical system that threatens to leave humanity behind.

Tiny tells the story about an elephant named “Timofen J. Tiny” who gets transferred to a elephant training camp where a hungry looking clown known as “Bozo The Clown" to used all elephants for steak and live bait, and now there's an escape plan for Tiny to go back home to his owner Sidney and go to Paradise with the help with some likable elephant friends... including Luma."
An uptight woman is poised to lead the church choir until her estranged sister-in-law shows up and challenges her for control of the congregation.

The 59th Annual Country Music Association Awards were on Wednesday, November 19, 2025 at Bridgestone Arena in Nashville. The ceremony will be broadcast live on ABC and will be available to stream the next day on Hulu. CMA award winner and six-time nominee this year, Lainey Wilson, hosted the ceremony.
Just when Brielle and Robert think their nightmare is over, their idyllic life goes awry when old and new faces emerge and they realize the nightmare is just beginning.
Clinton Baptiste's full length stand-up video is here! Prepare for the paranormal power of laughter!

Film_title: Conrad Molden - A UK Man in the EU
Description: Conrad's quick-wit and impeccable comedic timing promise to captivate an audience. A comedian who never underestimates his audience, preferring to delight with subtle intellect and keen observation. Conrad's signature style effortlessly weaves Danish and English together, appealing to Danes, international viewers, and everyone in between. This new show is all about Britain, Europe and the magic of stereotypes, culture and language.
Unleash the Inner Power, Rise as Legends
A single mother struggling to rebuild her life with her young son believes she is being stalked by her abusive ex-husband, only to learn that the truth is much darker and more terrifying.

Set in a hillside village on the edge of a dense forest, this survival thriller follows Shankaran, a young man haunted by a past wild boar attack. When his friends get trapped during a hunt, Shankaran must confront his deepest fears. As the group faces nature`s wrath and a deadly wild boar, the film unravels a gripping tale of survival and courage in the heart of the wilderness.
In an experimental short film with no beginning or ending, a woman finds herself lost in a mysterious house, silently influenced by enigmatic forces intending to keep her there forever.
An anthology of thrillers that explores what it means to navigate an unkind world and struggle to keep your head.
A documentary crew discovers a box of tapes, leading to disturbing events.

Elle heads back to her home to rescue her younger sister, related but strangers after many years have passed. Connected through a shared legacy, we watch as they bond. The connection Elle thought she had lost, may not be dead and gone.

Film_title: ATTACK! of the Viper and Cobra
Description: Two low-budget dancers perform a surprise birthday gram for Alex, who is so creeped out and shocked by their crude performances that she has a nightmare of her girlfriends being stalked and killed by a supernatural Killer Thong.
Charlotte takes revenge on the woman whose bullying led to her losing her eye.
An animated thesis short film originally presented as a capstone, and submitted to the Film Development Council of the Philippines for iAnimate 2025.

For a little over a year, I filmed and spliced ​​together different moments of which, to be honest, I don't remember much. The final result was edited onto two 600ft reels. There is no chronological progression, only fragments of a diary that I like to see as imaginary. I started filming in the spring with the aim of testing eight cameras. I filmed when I felt like it, day after day, and by the time summer arrived, I had accumulated a few reels and other old cameras. So in the winter, I decided to give shape to a film containing mistakes, notes, drafts, moments, and walks with pretty girls in the shadow of the valley where I grew up. "Shadow of the Valley" is my most personal and intimate work, made for myself only. I think anyone else will find it fake, self-centered, and downright pretentious.

Every fifteen years, a menace known only as Impervious returns to wreak havoc... But this year, when he finds the town seemingly abandoned, Impervious is forced to instead wrestle with his own personal demons.
Two women confronted with the difficultly of IVF must look into their past to deal with their present.

Jo works at the same bar since graduating college and as her friends seem to be moving forward in life, Jo feels stuck. Things get complicated when her ex-boyfriend, Patrick, moves back to town after the two haven’t spoken in months. The two must confront their lingering feelings as they try and navigate what they want, personally and professionally, but that isn't is easy it seems.

Car chases, point-blank violence, explicit sex, open fields, miserable conditions and a certain impulse for social denunciation. Luka trapped in his worst self, flees an event and escapes into a rehab that turns out to be a cult.
A Hollywood make-up artist struggles with the decision to tell her dying husband that she had an affair.

After a completely sold out and critically acclaimed run at the Edinburgh Festival, Andy is back with his brand new show, Bafflingly Optimistic. We’ve been visited by the Four Horsemen in the form of Disease, Death, War and overpriced Ketchup, so what hope can there be? Andy is Bafflingly Optimistic. 'For those who worry that we are going to hell in a handcart, Parsons will at least make you enjoy the ride' - The i
On a getaway in an unfamiliar city, a couple soon find themselves in a quarrel unfolding into a series of testing events diverting them into a redefined path of hope and faith.
Max searches for his perfect match, his white whale, his AngelFish.
When a small town is terrorized by mysterious creature in a shabby bear suit, all hell breaks loose. But it's not just any bear - It's a zombie with a taste for blood.

Two young sisters, Charliegh and Kemper, discover a mysterious box of five VHS tapes while their mother is asleep. As they watch, the tapes reveal chilling stories: paranormal enthusiasts encounter a terrifying creature; a police deputy and cameraman face a masked killer; a Christmas party turns deadly; a news anchor’s descent into terror; and two deer hunters’ horrific demise. Each segment intertwines with the next into a complex and terrifying story that slowly unfolds until the boundary between the videos and reality blur. Especially as Charliegh finds that her night may be as horrifying as the tapes she’s been watching.

Two years after the death of her husband, Kayla Brown has rebuilt her life following the launch of her successful memoir. She is then visited by a stalker, who is hell-bent on making her pay for what she has done in order to escape her husband.
The Campfire Special is a stand-up comedy special by Josh Wolf that blends comedy and music, featuring guest appearances by other performers.
In 1985 Arthur Peterson was a witness to something that would shape his life. Now he returns to the town where it all started.
A young man, lost and vulnerable, becomes entangled in a deadly game of temptation and redemption, where nothing is as it seems when you have lost everything, what's left to lose but your soul.

A small mechanical owl is brought to life by a mysterious castaway. Following a trail of corals leads the little robot into the magical world of the WITCHES OF EVERLAND. Does love exist in this strange universe? An epic journey into a fantastic parallel world, from the wilderness to the City of future. A magical & musical road movie about the circle of life, love and death - and the Power of imagination. Collection of the three previous shorts cut together to one movie.

Film_title: The Man Who Would Not Shake Hands
Description: A WWI veteran traumatized by his service in battle and the recent death of his fiancée moves out west to drink himself to death when he meets a mysterious buffalo soldier who believes he kills anyone he touches.
A new version of In-Expresivo (2022) Alexa arrives at a strange and colorful place, where she is pursued by The Man in the Mask, who will use her memories and emotions to torment her.

Film_title: Jamie Cullum: The Pianoman at Christmas
Description: Jamie Cullum returns to the Royal Albert Hall to play his festive perennial record “The Pianoman at Christmas.” Joined on stage by the big band including the talents of Kansas Smitty’s House Band featuring the Mercury-nominated Joe Webb, Jamie Cullum's show delivers a festive, fun and furious set with all the trimmings. Fans can expect unique collaborations and to be taken on a journey from the romantic, solo piano ballads of "Beautiful Together" and "Christmas Don’t Let Me Down" to the instant classics "Hang Your Lights" and "It’s Christmas."
A comedian and podcast host faces a life-altering medical crisis, leading to a profound journey of survival and healing while continuing his career in entertainment.

An adult detention group takes a bus trip to celebrate their graduation. Upon arrival at their destination of paradise, a strange sheriff warns them of recent abduction murders in the area while a gothic cult takes an unhealthy interest in the group.
A short comedic drama exploring the complexities of mixed heritage and belonging.

Billy, an anxious and dedicated late twenty-something, awakens to just another day with his not-so-trusty companion-a bird chained to his shoulder. Thrown for a loop by a diner server, he begins to wonder what's real and what's not. What does it even mean to have a crush? Using his own strange methods, he tries to see what's really there. Maybe it's love, maybe it's nothing.

DEA Agent Keith Miller remains haunted by his wife’s murder. As his partner Stokes eyes retirement and their boss Marks vanishes before a crucial vote, a captured assassin’s secret leads to a dangerous conspiracy and a deadly showdown.

Anthropomorphic manifestations of the hyperobjects of animal husbandry, millitarisation, forestry plantations and capitalist markets become combating characters in the poetic blockbuster Pinwydd. Rooted in the realities of landlordism, climate collapse, and extractivism, Pinwydd draws on sci-fi tropes and the Mabinogion myth of Blodeuwedd to rupture the seeming inevitability of capitalism. Pinwydd is a bilingual community folk sci-fi film made in the Dyfi Valley, mid-Wales, through a year-and-a-half of workshops, LARP events, and psychogeographic tours of local spruce plantations. Developed with the youth-led collective Stiwdio Dyfi and local lgbtqia+ participants, the film reimagines forestry landscapes and rural life through myth, fantasy, and collective production. Pinwydd was commisioned by Chapter and supported by Cyngor Celfyddydau Cymru, Ariennir Gan Y Loteri, Ty Cerdd, Andrew Logan Museum of Sculture and Stiwdio Dyfi.
When high-profile interior designer Kimberly Hightower goes missing while vacationing with friends, everyone is left searching for answers about her disappearance.
An overview of the rise of the performing arts in Christchurch and how it's currently reaching more people than ever.

A group of friends find themselves stranded on a forbidden mountain after an unforeseen accident. Desperate for help, they accidentally stumble upon the home of three mountain dwellers who will go to extreme lengths to protect their territory. Despite appearing as savage and bloodthirsty individuals with murderous intentions, there is a deeper narrative behind their actions.

In a desperate pursuit of artistic greatness, a struggling painter rents a decrepit studio flat, hoping to craft his magnum opus. But as his canvas begins to depict nightmarish visions—predicting his demise—he is thrust into a haunting descent.
Secrets unravel, obsession takes root, and betrayal ignites a fury no one saw coming when a woman's shattered heart triggers a quest for revenge.

Siji Martin, a destitute but determined young man, opts to navigate the upper-class world in Nigeria by getting engaged to a wealthy heiress. When his true love from his past arrives from the USA, he must decide what is more important.

A story about an international student, Diego, coming to Utrecht to study and make new friends. He quickly finds himself overwhelmed with his new life, and cant seem to fit in. However, with the help of some friends and his loving mother, he finds the confidence to try again and this time succeed in his new life.

The story follows a malevolent yet exceedingly sadistic chemist who's plotting an act of abomination in his old hometown of Springtown, PA while encountering three new victims into the mix of his imminent plan.

After his work gets rejected, a struggling writer finds inspiration in a Bible study group under the guidance of the cryptic Pastor Johnson. What begins as a creative revival slowly twists into something far more mysterious and dangerous.
Two friends who adore cinema, embark on a wondrous, chaotic and exhilarating journey of filmmaking
A completely real collection of television programs and advertisements from Channel 2.5, a TV station from 1963.

A man is accused of murdering his wife. However, he claims it was suicide and that he tried to stop her, but it was too late. During the trial, more and more secrets about the relationship, which was perhaps not so idyllic and romantic, come to light.

Film_title: The Mysterious Disappearance Of A Duck
Description: rena baldooth is an everyday guy he works at mcdonalds and pays his bill one day he meets a mysterius girl they fall in love and have a baby-ducky one day ducky went on a heist but he never came back...what begen as a Disappearance devloped into thing that will knock your mind,all narrated by our very own:denis the wolf(yes he did this job to get money to get steve out of the neather)

For decades, UFOs have intrigued the world, but many scientists avoided studying them. In the United States, after highly publicised sightings of unidentified objects by US Navy pilots, UFOs are moving out of the shadows and into the light as NASA pledges to study them scientifically. So what does science have to say? Though some are identified as balloons, drones, weather phenomena or optical illusions, others remain mysterious. Could they be the result of secret new technology? And what would it take for alien engineers to traverse vast distances to send probes or visit Earth from other solar systems? Explore the evidence as astrophysicists and engineers use new technologies to investigate the strangest objects in our skies.

A mysterious and dangerous monkey named Ape is aiming to take over the universe, but heroes Panther Hulk and Ogreman step in to save the day. Will Ape's plan to take over the world work, or will the hero's save the day.

The documentary traverses the travels of a young woman who is deeply concerned about the social political circumstances in India and across the globe. Her thoughts become muddled and she falls into the depths of depression, emanating from the murky relationships in her life - as an individual within her family and in society along with her identity and the forlorn love
A domestic drama about a young family facing a financial crisis.
Four broke filmmakers start stripping at amateur night. As they chase money deeper into nightlife, tragedy strikes, leading to life-changing consequences that make or break them.

Abay Nadkarni has not had a typical life, but it has been hysterical. From the terror of driving around San Francisco with propane tanks in his car to programming vibrators, there is nothing to do but give in to the Brown Jesus.

When confronted with questions and a missing friend. A man with nothing left to lose and a lifetime of demons is forced to address the ugliness of his past in an attempt to heal. What transpires is a twisted turn of events that will forever change the shape of his life.

In a world that continues to suppress freedom of expression, music can be a weapon. But while protest songs shine a light, can they truly propel change? This documentary offers a brand-new take on the subject of protest songs. Bristling with iconic, high-impact and powerful songs - it asks: Do Protest Songs actually make a difference? The answer, from an impressive cast list of singers and songwriters is revelatory. Featuring Smokey Robinson, Hozier, Skin (Skunk Anansie), Two-Tone's Jerry Dammers, Angélique Kidjo, Holly Johnson, David McAlmont, Rhiannon Giddens and more.
When she receives news that her estranged mother has died, a Nigerian woman must return home from the UK and confront the pain of her past.
A compilation of scenes from film & television that take place in darkrooms
An ex-gangster chef's son gets involved with his old mafia associates. To save his family, the father must return to the criminal world and confront deadly challenges.

A young man's quest to lose his virginity spirals into a hilarious journey of self-discovery. Meet Jeffery—awkward, endearing, and desperate to shed his V-card. After his fake sex stories backfire at work, his friends set him up on a series of cringeworthy dates, including a mix-up with a gay man that leads to unexpected revelations. As Jeffery stumbles through one absurd failure after another, he begins to realize that sex isn’t the answer—self-love and connection are. How to Break Your Virginity is a sharp, heartfelt comedy about identity, friendship, and learning to love yourself, no matter who you are.

crying as innocence; crying as a ritual; crying for a maturity you may never reach. crying over heartbreaks, crying for memories, crying for your dreams and the present—a crystal cry. crying until the pillow is soaked, so that then you can laugh ha ha ha
When 3 friends experience an early mid-life crisis, they turn upon an invisible house that grants them the ability to live their deepest desires.

In 1878 a youthful bounty hunter by the name of Django sets out on a journy of redemption. every bounty could be his last but this doesn't stop the hero from capturing a tonic seller who has been giving people a mad virus.

Maya is a patient in a hospital in the mountains of Slovakia. She possesses abilities that allow her to sense emotions and events in space and time. This gift makes her interesting to the local police, who use her to find missing people. The latest case involves an eight-year-old girl who has been abducted. Unfortunately, Maya fails to find her in time, and the child is found dead in the forest. This devastates Maya both psychologically and physically.

Film_title: The Tall-N-Short Halloween Special - Vol. VI
Director: Cash Davenport, Jackson Neuberger et al
Description: The sixth annual TNS Halloween Special

Someone accused of homicide 30 years ago finally has the footage to clear their name: a class project from 1995 about a local urban legend that became an accidental documentary of the final moments of three students' lives.

Film_title: Heir to the Rift: Part I
Description: Adjusting to college life, Sammy is visited by Morague, who has bad news, which Sammy is responsible for. They must team up and seek out something which may hold the key to rebuilding the stability of time. In this thrilling story of fate, grief, and adventure, The Choice Saga will never be the same...

Mike is a married man whose life changes after a hidden affair leaves him HIV positive. Struggling with guilt, fear, and the impact on his marriage, he begins attending a support group. There he meets Wes, a gay man dealing with his own experiences and stigma around HIV. Through their conversations and growing friendship, the two men confront shame, secrecy, and the emotional fallout of the diagnosis. Their connection becomes a space for honesty and reflection as Mike re-examines his relationships, identity, and responsibility toward the people in his life.

The bone-chilling story of two hitmen—Foxy and Chachi—who part ways when Chachi decides to retire. Feeling betrayed, Foxy dives into his work with ferocious intensity, leading to disastrous hits, vengeful mobsters, and an encounter with a deranged pig farmer.

The red carpets are unfurled as award season arrives. The film industry's highest honors are now within reach. It goes without saying that with critically acclaimed films and shows vying for recognition, the competition is fierce.

This zombie-comedy short follows a dad and his teenage daughter at their local roller rink's annual Halloween party, but this year's bash abruptly turns to hell on four wheels when the roller skaters mysteriously start to transform into zombies.
A collaborative film featuring contributions from the members of the YellowTealPurple forum, stitching together genres of video rarely juxtaposed against one another.
The teenage thieves known as the Mavericks plan to work with new kid Ezra Pawk when they finally decide it's time to pull off a heist that's worth a lot more than money.

Film_title: Wavelength Performed on an Offhand Example
Description: An experimental film by J. Catherine Traverse
Kings Kaleidoscope brings their pioneering alternative-gospel sound and ‘modern psalms’ lyricism with a deconstructed ensemble performance.
After murdering his business partner Donald Whitney is haunted by his ghost. Ten years later a familiar priest gets stopped in the rain and seeks shelter in Whitney manor for the night.

Using found analogue film footage combed from personal archives accompanied by an improvised soundtrack created in response to the visuals, this raw and at times chaotic live performance combines the techniques of film-scratching and direct animation with experimental sound-making.
Carrying both a second-hand mattress and their emotional baggage to their new home, a young queer couple end up on a journey that results in the discovery of one's infidelity.

Film_title: Ilraan's Contemplation On The Crisis of Existence
Description: Ilraan's Contemplation on the Crisis of Existence unfolds in six acts, each set in a different place. Ilraan moves through ruins, forests, abandoned houses, and distant shores not in search of beauty, but meaning. Yet the more he tries to make sense of the world, the less it offers.
