Each image, each moment, brings only more questions. The silence deepens, not with peace, but with doubt. The world refuses to explain itself it only mirrors his unease. And in that quiet unraveling, Ilraan begins to lose faith in the shape of reality itself.
A sex worker, widower and the staff of a has-been radio station collide in this riveting tale of second chances and redemption.
Andy Mitten tells the story of Manchester United’s triumphant European Campaign in the 1990/91 season with the fans who lived through it and the Red legends who won it!
Kenny Robinson's legendary comedy showcase has influenced Canadian comedy for 30 years, with performances by Russell Peters, Hassan Phills, Crystal Ferrier, Mr. Lewin and others.

A declaration of love for a traditional club: to mark its 125th anniversary, this two-part documentary celebrates the legendary club from the Lower Rhine region. Featuring Günter Netzer, Lothar Matthäus and Christoph Kramer.

An aging hitman seeks redemption, gathering his assassin family amid mayhem and intrigue. As dark secrets unravel, loyalties shatter, blurring love and betrayal in an adrenaline-fueled tale where bullets fly and stakes are high.
John builds a criminal empire in the strange and absurd world of GTA Online with the help of his friends, but their time of carefree chaos won't last forever.
A Cherub delivers a message from God through an ultrasound
A heartbroken woman finds a mysterious note in a park and begins a correspondence with the stranger who wrote it.
Amy, a young girl with a troubled past, returns to her childhood home, having run away while her parents were on the brink of divorce

A dance short that explores love through the concept of equations and the element of fire; unraveling the sensual, tender exploration that comes with opposite attraction. Beneath opposing forces, harbors a unified, shared energy-- intangible to touch, yet, utterly felt.

Set after The Whisper (2023) and The Whisper 2: Natural Connection (2024), this full-length movie sequel follows a town plagued by disappearances. Three men embark on a desperate search, leading them toward a chilling truth.

Film_title: Jim Davidson: Live and (Very Very) Risky
Description: The countries most loved comedian is back (and very very risky!) as he refuses to back down to todays inoffensive and woke standard of comedy. Grab yourself a beer, sit back, relax and watch as Jim Davidson OBE brings you some proper comedy live at the Concorde club.

"See the ‘60s end with a bang and a whimper. Cosmic journeys pass in what might be a single violent night. Fantasies fissure as urban guerrillas talk themselves to death while hallucinating acid freaks revolt (at least in their mind)." – J. Hoberman
A getaway game of truth or dare leads four friends to swap partners, risking everything to reignite passion and save their marriages.

Tension runs high for writer/director Matthew Steele as he awakens in shock to find himself surrounded by six dead women with a 9mm in-hand. In a desperate search for answers, he is confronted by a mysterious caller who taunts him unrelentingly and strives to push him to the brink of insanity. As this spiraling mind-twist of mystery and suspense unfolds, Matthew also finds himself caught between a perpetuating nightmare that seemingly will not end and a suicidal reality that oddly mirrors his dark, demented screenplay called, "The Enemy". —Alexander Kane

Venezuelan refugees speak openly about their lives in the shadows on Curaçao and Aruba. From a deserted soldier to a bricklayer, and from a hospitality entrepreneur to an education specialist. What is it like to live in a legal vacuum, a victim of exploitation and under constant threat of deportation?

Film_title: Revenge of the Alternates 3: Once & For All
Description: In the climactic finale of the Revenge of the Alternates(ROTA) trilogy, the stakes are higher than ever as Cole Burger and Jack Murdock lead their schools—Bonney Lake and Puyallup—into a showdown that will determine more than just bragging rights. With pulse-pounding choreography, dramatic twists, and unforgettable musical moments, Revenge of the Alternates 3 is a genre-blending ride through rivalry, redemption, and the power of performance.
A short horror film.

Film_title: On the Aftermath of Domestic Hyper-Interiority
Description: The artwork titled "On the Aftermath of Domestic Hyper-Interiority" treats an emotional landscape woven into the core of our existence at home. This work employs the collection of eight short scenes, each one lasting one minute, taken within a domestic settig, inspired by still life images, paintings, and photograhs, along with a ninth screen featuring a text.
a teenage boy falls in love with an amazing but broken girl. he believes he can fix her, but her priorities leave him obsessed with unfulfilled dreams and desires.
Two young men find themselves stuck alone together at a bus stop only to discover they have more in common than they expected

Embattled LA private eye Chino Diamond is hired to track down Wilt, a mysterious man on the run with a set of fabled jazz tapes from late jazz legend Mink Fungus. As Chino navigates the seedy underbelly of Los Angeles, he finds himself dodging the ruthless henchmen of Koviak, a powerful mobster who wants the tapes for his own sinister plans. From dive bars to back-alley sushi joints, this animated noir romp blends wild characters, dry humor, and unexpected twists through a city as strange as its inhabitants.

In the wild summer lands of the Yukon, a newborn horse takes his first steps into the world. When tragedy strikes, a young foal is forced to run for his life carrying with him the legacy of his mother, the kindness of strangers, and a destiny shaped by survival, loyalty, and courage as the seasons change.

Follows the story of Dwayne "Doc" Mays, born in North Carolina and raised in Chicago by his streetwise mother. After the death of his mother, his hard life would lead to him becoming one of the most notorious gangsters in the city.

Film_title: My Cousin’s Big Fat Durban Wedding
Description: When reality TV star Kieran’s long-lost cousin Anushka asks him to plan her dream wedding in three weeks, he’s all in, until he discovers her mysterious groom is someone from his painful past. With family chaos, culture clashes, and comic relief from Granny Aaiya, Kieran must decide whether to expose the truth or let his cousin’s fairytale wedding go on.

An experimental avant-garde film where the character battles with herself, struggling to understand and embrace her true identity. Blending dream-like and reality sequences together, the film connotes inside the character’s mind. Escaping to different parts of her subconscious, she is met with confrontation, fear & desire. This piece of work highlights themes of identity, surrealism & subjectivity, where the instability of the self is at the forefront of the film. The film uses elements of mixed media montage to portray the character’s inner thoughts.

Film_title: Puppet Master III: Toulan's Revenge Noir
Description: See where the PUPPET MASTER saga began in director David De Coteau's action and intrigue-packed prequel PUPPET MASTER 3: TOULON'S REVENGE, a franchise fan favorite, now presented in vintage BLACK & WHITE for extra retro cool effect! After hearing that mystical toymaker Andre Toulon has managed to create a troupe of sentient, living puppets, Nazi underling Dr. Hess sets his sights on exploiting Toulon's powers for the glory of the Reich. But when Toulon's wife Elsa is killed and Toulon is whisked away by the Nazis, his puppets attack and rescue their maker. Now hellbent on revenge, the puppetmaster creates a new line of stringless assassins, including the laughing Six Shooter and Leech Woman, a creature made in his late wife's image. Can one man and his murderous marionettes take down the wrath of the Gestapo?

On the day his first child is born, Dan decides to have a swift pint with his best friend before he goes to the hospital. Halfway down the pint, all hell breaks loose. Wetting the baby's head will never be the same again.

Drifter Damon Jackson (Kaamel "Diezel" Hasaun) moves to Houston for a new lease on life. Becoming the neighborhood maintenance man only to fall in love with residence Kenya Brown (Brandy Specks), friends and neighbors come up as missing leads.

Traveling across the country to make a new start, The Woman tries to escape her past, only to fall deeper into her other personality, Olivia. Seeking an alternative approach through psychedelic therapy at the Sanitaria Institut, The Woman's & Olivia's lines of reality start to blur & the truth fully begins to collapse in on itself.

Quaid Branson is abducted by aliens on the night of his engagement celebration and abruptly sent off to the Darovingian Mines; an asteroid slave mining colony on the outer rim of the galaxy. After toiling away for 7 years, he finally meets Ezekiel Plymouth and manages to engineer their harrowing escape and return to earth with grave and dire consequences for the entire planet.

One rainy day, London-based artist and musician Jesse Kanda observes his father Kasuhisa make a big block of homemade I tofu. Son helps strain seawater, Father slices the curd with deliberation. Newly fermented, a smaller block of tofu is mixed with shoyu, ginger, green onion, and nori. Dirt on feet and body, on a hammock, lying on a bed inside a fanned room: two people from two generations and cultural upbringings, and their two different aftercares.
Get the latest breaking news and rivalry analysis from a panel of experts before the action gets underway at NXT Heatwave​!

When high school senior and math prodigy, Ethan Young is enrolled in public school for the first time, his privileged, upper-class life becomes a secret he must hide if he wants to fit in and successfully lead his new school's underdog economics team to victory. And after being relegated to public school for disobeying his father (Wayne), Ethan is forced to choose between two competing priorities of becoming a successor to his father's business legacy or forging his own path and helping his newfound friends.
Screened at Bleeding Edge Fest 2

Yolanda Hills, a woman deeply in love with her longtime partner Jonas Jones, has been patiently awaiting their wedding day. Their idyllic relationship takes a terrifying turn when a home intruder invades their peaceful sanctuary. Held captive in her own home, Yolanda is confronted with a shocking revelation that will forever alter the course of their lives.
A couple made for each other both start to fall away from each other, but they decide to do something that decides what their relationship would come down to. This film is made alone
After disability and trauma forces life to change track, the discovery of cycling reveals a powerful new ability that drives three unique athletes to chase a Paralympic dream.
A serial killer in Bradford England has the entire North of England panicked until he has a mysterious visitor who upends his life and murderous routines.

Film_title: Matt Wright - Live at the Majestic
Description: The debut comedy special from two time JUNO Award losing comedian Matt Wright, "Live at the Majestic" filmed at The Majestic Theatre in St. John's Newfoundland, explores the thin line between being smart and dumb, the struggles of paying taxes, tips on planning a wedding and much more.
Home alone for a week, Jim sets up a stair camera to prove he’s not imagining things. What it records reveals a horror far beyond what he expected.
Claire Hunter, a true crime documentary filmmaker investigating a cold case, discovers that her film has been hijacked by a demonic serial killer, unaware that reality has been altered.
Three teenage freaks get tired of being bullied and kidnap the high school's most elite for a weekend of torment and torture.

Gabe, a British film student who, after a brutal robbery in Amsterdam, decides to uncover the truth behind a mysterious masked avenger. What begins as a documentary ends in a nightmare of violence, betrayal, and obsession.

Duran Duran, pop pioneers who became global icons, have never stopped looking to the future while embracing their heritage. In the cosy intimacy of the Baloise Session, the band gets closer to the audience. An authentic concert without artifice.

Greek Detective Helen Moustakas is taken by surprise by a New Zealand farmer called Shirley Rangi, claiming to be her half-sister. Helen is reluctant to believe this revelation, and so agrees to a DNA test. In the meantime, however, Helen is called to investigate the peculiar death of an Archaeologist. A mystery which Shirley proves unexpectedly, although accidentally, helpful in solving.

At the garden of Thebes, Creon sits, trapped in a never-ending cycle of grief and torment over the loss of his family. Creon knew it was all his fault, the loss of his family due to his egotistical punishments towards his niece, Antigone. The memories he had with Antigone haunt him until they take over his mind completely.
Infidelity and control lead to dramatic consequences for Greg, causing strain on his family. Trust, redemption and family dynamics are explored.

Film_title: K-36 vs. A Rogue Kolbroy clone
Description: In a planet were everyone looks the same, the godlike ninja clone of Gravity, Speed and psychic, K-36, is sent on a mission to take care of a rouge clone who tries to kill every single clone left.
When the King gets kidnapped by a pair of neo-Nazis, Mario, Luigi, Link, and Zelda embark on a harrowing journey to rescue the King from a fate even worse than death.
A trio seeking karmic revenge against a corrupt detective find themselves with more than they bargained for when they accidentally save a teenage runaway.

At a lavish party, Jared presents plans to replace an arts district with a smart city, facing opposition from his brother and an arts commissioner. A mysterious illusionist shows them the area's past and future.

Film_title: Lefty V Mo: Part Two - Dread of the Saints
Description: The saga continues as Lefty and Mo's feud turns into an all out war between saints.

Vladimir and Estragon wait near a tree on a barren stretch of road, inhabiting a drama spun from their own consciousness. The result is a comical wordplay of poetry, dreamscapes and nonsense, which has been interpreted as a somber summation of mankind's inexhaustible search for meaning.

An artificial intelligence, created from the mind of a rogue hacker, unleashes an apocalyptic plan to destroy the world and save the only person he ever loved: his daughter, Emma. Facing humanity's collapse and the haunting echoes of a broken past, Emma embarks on a race against time to save the world.

73-year-old Evamay road trips with her grown granddaughter back to the town where she grew up and hasn't returned to in over 50 years. The granddaughter discovers much about her grandmother including why it took so long for her to return.

South African comedy royalty Tumi Morake and Trevor Gumbi take the reins as co-Roast Masters, ensuring that no punchline lands gently. With Helen Zille in the hot seat and a cross-section of South African voices - anything can happen.
A horror short film.

"Devoted Heart" reimagines the Nativity in modern times. War veteran Joe Shepherd returns home to find fiancée Mary mysteriously pregnant. An angelic dream reveals the divine truth: she carries Jesus, humanity's savior. Braving gossip and doubt, they embark on a census-mandated road trip, stranding in a storm where Mary births Jesus in a shed. Angelic visions summon migrant workers to adore the child.
When their sister leaves a mysterious voice note before disappearing, two women go undercover to track her down
A fan-film about Johnny Storm (Human Torch) when left in the Baxter Building, strange things happen.
Two hosts of the popular news show "Budgit News" reunite in a hilarious and emotional final show.
Jay Fisher and Josh Moore join 20 OnlyFans creators in Bali for a high-stakes collab. Beyond sex and spectacle, they explore ambition, chosen family, and community on this misunderstood platform.

On his last night as DPO, CSP Wale Savage faces a deadly siege by gang leader Shina, seeking revenge for his brother's death. With downed officers, dwindling ammunition, and escalating chaos, Wale must choose between upholding the law or joining the prisoners to survive.

Film_title: Puppet Master: Axis Termination | Noir Version
Description: The final chapter in the PUPPET MASTER "Axis" trilogy (following AXIS OF EVIL and AXIS RISING)! This third adventure once more sees our heroes teaming up with Toulon's micro-assassin's to bring down the Nazis...and Nazi puppets! Fight fascism, the Full Moon way, this time in GLORIOUS, silvery, moody and macabre BLACK AND WHITE!

Film_title: Puppet Master Axis Rising Noir Version
Description: The direct sequel to PUPPET MASTER: AXIS OF EVIL presented here is silvery, shuddery black and white NOIR! This time, as our heroes Danny and Beth wage war with the Nazis, the fascist fiends use Toulon's iconic puppets to create a race of immortal soldiers...and a few despicable Nazi puppets! The battle continues in this thrilling entry in Full Moon's most famous film series!

A young mechanic’s dream build becomes his worst nightmare when his missing 1978 C3 Corvette resurfaces, transformed into a death machine leaving a trail of bodies - and every clue points back to him.
When a groundbreaking medical procedure promises to turn slackers into overachievers, an aging father sees it as his last chance to achieve the American Dream-through his unemployed adult daughter.

Eryka is a documentary filmmaker who has just returned from filming at the Saharawi refugee camps in Africa. Arriving on the coast in southern Spain to meet her boyfriend, Marc, she discovers he has vanished when he was hang-gliding over the ocean. Thinking the Coast Guard search is ineffective, she begins her own search with the help of Marc’s best friend, David.
King Joseph and Mando Man fight over how to handle the previously evil Mr. Movie after he helps save the fatverse in the previous entry of the King Joseph saga.
A short narrative film.

Film_title: The Chronicles of Charles Li: 8 Fundamental Philosophies He Learned in Life
Description: A one-night-only special event presented by Charles Li, where he takes the audience on an emotional journey to share stories from his childhood, the moral dilemmas he faced growing up, and the heartfelt principles he learned from these life lessons.

During the dress rehearsal for a festive Christmas play in small-town Serenity, Iowa, star Louise Lamont topples over after a bite of prop pastry. Since the frosty actress had earned plenty of enemies through her offstage dramatics, the cast of suspects is longer than Santa's "Naughty or Nice" list. Prop mistress Brandy Borne and her diva-turned-director mother, Vivian-assisted by their savvy shih tzu, Sushi-must solve this fruitcake fatality before it's curtains for anyone else.
Burned-out exec Olivia and reclusive writer Theo meet when their dogs' leashes tangle, sparking a charming, unexpected romance-for both pairs.
Cat walks to a ball

Adebisi, a young woman from a wealthy family, has her life shattered by her father's controlling grip. Finally allowed to experience freedom through the NYSC program, she embarks on a journey of self-discovery, befriending a young man from a humble background who challenges her perspectives. As she begins to find her voice and assert her independence, her father's wrath looms large. In a desperate bid to protect her daughter, Adebisi's seemingly docile mother reveals a depth of strength and determination, confronting the secrets and lies that have defined their family's dynamics. As the mother's hidden narrative unfolds, the film exposes the complexities of mother-daughter relationships, unresolved grief, and the struggle for individuality.
Jack awakens one day and begins to realize that a new drink has swept through his town and the people around him are acting strange. Little by little the truth begins to show itself.
A narrative feature film.

Follow Jarvis and Tre's journey through a treacherous drug deal testing their loyalties and forcing them to confront their fears. With intense action and shifting alliances the film explores the consequences of choices made under pressure.
Stop motion short of powerlines

WE ARE LOOKING FOR NEW MODELS. THE MODEL WE ARE LOOKING FOR IS A NEW MODEL OF LOOKING FOR MODELS. WE ARE LOOKING FOR NEW MODELS TO LOOK FOR. WE ARE LOOKING FOR NEW WAYS OF LOOKING. AND WE ARE LOOKING FOR NEW LOOKING MODELS BECAUSE THE OLD MODEL IS KILLING US.
In 1986, Los Angeles, a Mexican-American dancer, risks everything to audition for a prestigious gala in his grandfather's Zoot Suit—only to be told he’s ‘too Mexican.’
Lucy Pearson fights against the bittersweet sting of growing up in the process of moving from her childhood home and parting with the stained glass window that illustrated her adolescence.
jake schick's debut stand up comedy special

In this Greek Tragedy, A King named Myops is constantly plagued by horrific omens and decides to seek council from the Gods, only to soon discover that his past actions and hidden guilt, may have led him towards a gruesome fate once he forces the Oracle to enact a divination.

Puccini's "La Bohème" is undoubtedly one of the most watched operas in the world. This undisputed tearjerker, written by the brilliant Italian composer ("Madame Butterfly", "Tosca") in the last years of the 19th century, still touches the hearts of viewers. In the summer of 2024, it will be shown in a new staging at the famous Verona Arena di Verona amphitheater, where every evening - during the Opera Festival held since 1913 - over 20,000 spectators watch great performances. The huge stage under the summer open sky was transformed into a snow-covered 19th-century Paris, and the performance featured international stars. We will now see all this on the big screen.
Best friends can get you through the hardest of times.
western criollo

A young man walks through the open fields of his mind, chasing the echoes of a love lost too soon. Surrounded by fleeting memories and whispers carried by the wind, he confronts his grief and finds peace in letting go.
The tale of two tribes. A battle for the jewel that brought them apart.
Seven lonely men drastically alter each others' lives as their insecurities lead them into the web of a dark conspiracy.

In a secret multiverse shaped by an Artificial Oracle (AO) trapped in an ancient Etruscan quantum computer, Taitle, Master of the Labyrinth, is caught in a lucid dream. Only Vecu, a code-born Nymph, can invoke lost rites to save him before all collapses.

Film_title: Written with Ice Crystals: Master Soviet Animator Lev Atamanov and The Snow Queen
Description: A video essay by film historian Evan Chester included on Deaf Crocodile's blu ray release Treasures of Soviet Animation Vol 2
Mankind's greatest thief, Danny Walker allows a film crew to follow his final heist, but tensions arise between them as he reassesses his legacy and wrestles with lingering guilt.

A woman is sent to a remote cabin by her therapist, as she finalises her treatment on recovering from an abusive relationship. Her therapist has also sent another client there at the same time. Their tasks are unclear. After several days, they are joined by their best friends. The woman's ex partner seeks out her location by any means necessary. He joins forces with the other client's abusive ex, in a bid to descend on the therapy session.
An 8mm short film

The much-anticipated debut show about suffering (and smiling) from Nigerian stand-up Ayoade Bamgboye. Burdened by the gift of sight, a primeval awareness that something is not quite right, and almost three accents, she'll ask life's big questions and provide absolutely no answers.
Writer and Director Kevin O’Donnell’s debut short film and winner of Best Horror Short at 2025’s Cannes Short Film Festival.

A star-studded look at Broadway’s iconic Palace theater and its 30-ft rise above Times Square. Hosted by Frank DiLella, it features the team behind the lift and Broadway legends like Joel Grey, Bernadette Peters, Heather Headley, and more.

Tokyo’s streets may seem calm and quiet at night. But in a suburban garage, the night shift is just beginning. Tires are fitted, engines tuned, and tension rising. As street racers prepare to hit the roads, the police show up, looking to shut it all down. At 2 a.m., Japan’s drifters roll out to hone their skills and chase the dream of a professional racing career. Lithuania's Vytautas "Ironvytas" Medineckas dives into the world of Tokyo’s underground drift scene, where neither cops nor roadblocks can stop the night riders.

Film_title: My Will and Desire like Wheels Revolving
Description: A short video that aims to connect Dante’s Purgatory to the process of printing photos in a darkroom.

Film_title: Trump Revolution: 100 Days That Changed the World
Description: Following 100 turbulent days of Trump's second term - full of unprecedented political and economic decisions - commentators and insiders ask: is unpredictability and chaos part of the master plan?
YOU ARE ALWAYS RIGHT HERE is an emotional picture that follows Eve, a young black woman navigating the 2020 pandemic
Untitled project in production by I29 Entertainment

Max Richter recomposed Vivaldi’s Four Seasons in 2012, premiered by superstar violinist Daniel Hope. This reimagining brought one of the classical canon’s greatest hits to new audiences in techno clubs and on music platforms. To celebrate the tricentennial of the original, ARTE is showing a filmed staging of Richter’s work from 2014.

Morteza and his father are searching for medicine for his sick mother when Morteza learns she has passed away. His sister urges him to bring their father back to the hospital, but Morteza, unable to share the news, continues the search with his father. As they journey together, past conflicts and memories bring them closer, until Morteza finally finds a way to tell his father about their mother's death, drawing on a childhood memory of loss.
Simone and Tim, a married couple, receive a series of increasingly frantic voice messages from their guest, Janine, who left behind her water bottle after a dinner party.
After the chance meeting between reformed addict Ben & resident influencer Emily, a great darkness begins to take form within the creatives scene of Melbourne.
Asake performing Live at the Red Bull Symphonic with Glenn Alexander & Symphonic Orchestra

Film_title: Picton High School | Class of 2025 Wrapped
Description: A timeless memory of our Year 12 Journey. Thank you to all the students, teachers, and parents who supported us every step of the way. This video is for the class of 2025. Credits to those who made this video possible: • Directed, filmed, and edited by Joelle Nasser • Filmed and assisted by Aisata Bah • Filmed by Ashton Hobbs • Marketed & Produced by Aisata Bah
The story of 4 mental patients talking about themselves.

A summer of adventure, ghost hunting, and mysteries await Clayton, Scot, JayLynn, after the trio make a wish under the bridge to see ghosts, which starts them on a path of discovery that results in them uncovering a decades-long secret.
Experimental Tabletop Cinema
SWINE AND DINE is a dark, suspenseful short horror film from Black Ave Films, written and directed by Ronald Black and Christopher Avellino.

Film_title: Becoming the Night: A Nightwing Story
Description: In 2034 Batman Inc. is the leading body of government in the United States and meta-humans are now a rare breed from their powers being stricken by mandatory vaccines and chemical-tainted food and water.
A couple grows terrified as their son's eerie behavior escalates. Soon, they discover he is the key to an impending apocalypse—set to unfold on his next birthday.

Yuki York’s self-reflexive documentary is a personal essay, shot in an impoverished district of the Philippines, deemed “invisible” by York’s on-screen text. Tracing York’s roots, I Am Not Invisible asks local residents innocuous questions about their lives to better understand them, in turn offering to better understand York’s own Filipina grandmother.

Film_title: Jason Isbell: Live at the Capitol Theatre
Description: In celebration of the release of 'Foxes in the Snow', Jason Isbell played songs from his new album and more on a special night at the historic Capitol Theatre in Port Chester, New York.
Town's young soccer hero ends up on a surreal odyssey of fear, murder, and vengeance after he is forced to go into hiding from the Yakuza mafia.

Casey has been living alone in his quiet home until a young couple moved in. Due to his extreme sensitivity to noise, he struggles to live with others and needs to find a way to make them leave. Desperate to reclaim his peace, Casey is determined to restore his solitude, though he knows it will require a difficult sacrifice. His desire for a peaceful life outweighs the challenges he must face to regain it.

Through moments of humor, tension, and vulnerability, Esther learns that true love isn't measured by wealth or status but by authenticity, self-growth, and unexpected connections. As secrets unravel and betrayals surface, she must decide: Will she embrace the life she truly wants, or succumb to the one others have chosen for her? This is a powerful story of healing, resilience, and the courage to redefine happiness on one's own terms.

This film isn't about unlearning love; it's about rediscovering it—especially for oneself. Even when Kath's path changed, she still found what she was always meant to discover: a part of herself that had long been waiting to be seen.

Film_title: The Science Adventures of Tom and Huck
Description: Tom Sawyer and Huck Finn return in all-new, science-filled adventures. With Becky Thatcher and friends, they tackle trappers, robbers, and old foes-learning real science like gravity, energy, and magnetism along the way.

Film_title: Imagine Dragons: Hipódromo de San Isidro 2025
Description: Imagine Dragons concert streamed live on Flow.
After a spree of serial killings across Los Santos, a depressed, alcoholic detective attempts to solve the identity behind the killer.
A masked vigilante armed with a clothes iron and the ghost of a slain detective attempt to stop a ruthless gang of devil worshippers from resurrecting a demon.

Xander, a charismatic but self-destructive popper addict, navigates the neon-drenched chaos of Palermo, Buenos Aires, with a crew of Grindr-found misfits: his on-again-off-again boyfriend, Dennis (a DJ with a penchant for chaos), Tano (a scheming ex-model turned crypto bro), and Vicente (a volatile bouncer with a hair-trigger temper). Their nights blur into mornings at clubs, chasing euphoria through popper-fueled hookups, synthwave beats, and glitter-coated escapism.
Follows comedians who perform and participate in improvised, interview-style segments that create unique interactions with the audience.

Film_title: The ghost light of the Big Thicket
Description: Deep in the Big Thicket of Texas is a Ghost who roams the night holding a lantern .Some say he is a friendly spirit, while some who go in search of him never return.
“I Was A... LIVE", Recorded and Filmed on January 18th, 2025 at The Schottenstein Center in Columbus, OH
Supa Eleph goes home to see his mother, while Mr Evil tries to kill him.

Staring at the Sun is a "sc-fi documentary" exploring the dark side of solar geoengineering: the deliberate, large-scale modification of the Earth’s climate systems by manipulating the influence of the sun. Set globally across the Louisiana Bayou to the Arctic Circle, Wyoming to Gstaad, and from the Great Barrier Reef of Australia to the palm oil plantations of Indonesia, this work examines geoengineering proposals that are currently undergoing research and development in both the United States and Europe, as well as current evolutions in climate modeling and digital twin technology
A wrongfully convicted rapper is released from prison and comes home to a lifetime opportunity. He has won a place on a dark web game where music executives run the show to win a recording contract.
Lucy after waking up in a random building faces a mysterious figure looking to harm her. Will she escape in time before its too late?
Based on the True Story of Ithaca's infamous serial killer...

Two friends run a ghost capturing business, but have never actually encountered a ghost. Their last ditch effort is when they get a call to a school claiming to be haunted, and they end up encountering the queen of the underworld who plans to open up a portal and release her evil army to take over the mortal plane. Now they must work together to defeat her.

Film_title: Battle Beast : Circus of Doom - Live in Helsinki 2023
Description: Two decades into their career, with six records since their formation in 2005, 300M+ streams, four consecutive number #1 albums, and the strongest line-up the Finnish power/symphonic metal group ever had, it’s about time Battle Beast release a proper live release captured in January 2023 at the sold-out Helsinki Ice Hall showing that the sextet is at the top of their game right now! “Circus Of Doom – Live in Helsinki 2023” is a triumphant display of entertaining and monumental heavy rock. Live recording from Helsinki Ice Hall, Finland, on the 27th of January 2023.

Join Diane Dripp and Percy Padding as they use games, songs, and powerful hypno triggers to teach you about the importance of wearing and using diapers, drinking from a bottle, sucking on a pacifier, and much more!

It is the dawn of the Third World War and three women find themselves in a dangerous world as they trek across the Central Valley of California in the wake of a nuclear blast that has destroyed San Francisco.

WHO GETS TO FLY is a multichannel video installation meandering through a cultural history of birds. The project examines the primary human-avian contradiction, that birds are deployed as both symbols of settler empire and emblems of anti-colonial resistance.
An activist prepares to defend a tract of native bush from the predatory forces of capital - and from something stranger, waiting in the woods.

After his estranged activist mother's suspicious death, an ambitious music producer on the verge of his big break must risk his career and his life to expose the corrupt police conspiracy she was murdered to protect.
A young man is harassed by a ghostly figure after purchasing a statue.
Two detectives discover series of leads to break a mystery code to rescue a victim from someone who existed back in time .
A young man recounts an unsettling event from his childhood. A fan project based on the novel by Dathan Auberach

Film_title: L.A. GUNS: The Hollywood Years - Live & Loaded
Description: The original L.A. GUNS lineup live in concert in Hollywood with bonus interviews and rare backstage footage. Come along on this wild, lust-fuelled, gasoline-soaked, intoxicating rocket ride of pure 80's metallic mayhem! Tracii, Phil, Steve, Kelly and Mick (the original gunners) lay it on the line in this down & dirty tell all, a sunset strip concert with rare, never before seen backstage footage from the electric gypsies' early road ravages. Enjoy outrageous, interviews recounting the band's origins, interspersed with vintage, raw concert footage of the boys in their prime! Relive the passion, parties, sweat and hi-octane thrills that propelled L.A. GUNS to mega-notoriety and forever etched their star on the loud 'n gritty, oh so pretty streets of the Los Angeles hard rock explosion! Rare interview footage , Photo slideshow and extra songs too!
Steve Skyfire and Willard Midnight embark on the tenacious journey of becoming professional wrestlers, eventually venturing into newfound fame and superstardom.

Robert Schumann’s secular oratorio Das Paradies und die Peri, created and first performed in 1843. The libretto derives from a German translation of a verse epic by the Irish writer Thomas More entitled Lalla Rookh, which in turn makes use of Persian mythology.

Quiet the Sirens follows the inspiring journeys of three brave firefighters as they recover from the debilitating effects of PTSD through an innovative program. This groundbreaking initiative combines group therapy with the transformative power of psychedelic ketamine, offering new hope to those struggling with trauma.

On June 22, 1971, Joni Mitchell released Blue, concluding her prolific four album run for Reprise Records with an album considered by many to be one of the greatest of all time. Its stirring, confessional songs have been celebrated by music lovers and critics alike for decades while inspiring a wide variety of artists as diverse as Prince and Taylor Swift. Even today, its stature as a masterpiece continues to grow. This blu-ray release includes DTS-HD Master Audio 2.0, DTS-HD Master Audio 4.0 and Dolby Atmos mixes.

In this mockumentary, a crew of ufologists revisits lost UFO footage from 2016 in Brazil. When shocking evidence resurfaces in 2024, they uncover a government conspiracy. Amid awkward encounters and cosmic chaos, they must decide whether to expose the truth or vanish into silence.
Attorney David Egusa balances partner ambitions with feelings for coworker Lola while they defend Eric Deng, an immigrant in a deportation case after violence, raising questions about love.

Since their early childhood, Sébastien, Céline and Stéphane were very close brothers and sisters until Céline met Luigi, the father of her son Marco. A relationship that Sébastien and Stéphane did not approve of. This harmful relationship created a distance between the 2 brothers and the sister. Since Stéphane was released from prison, Sébastien, who is less resentful than his brother, will try by all means to reconnect Céline and Stéphane. But, after a tragic event in their sister's life, they have no choice but to help her without knowing what awaits them. The two brothers will venture into totally crazy galleys, with disconcerting clumsiness, each more hilarious than the last.

Film_title: Modern Samurai 2: The Last Modern Samurai
Description: Two years after James Arc and Chase Lang stopped the nefarious Wilbur Wachauf, the Blade Clan is assaulted by a group of mercenaries known as the Shadow Assassins. Wilbur now finds himself faced with a strange companion and a foe much more dangerous than a couple of Modern Samurais.
An idyllic run turns nightmarish for a young woman when the sun goes down.
A man faces the consequences of sleeping with his bosses wife.
A horror short film.

A mockumentary that follows the 5 main contestants of The Golden Apron contest, a competition in search of "the greatest home chef in America", being held by a nefarious food manufacturing company with their own corporate agenda.

Film_title: Conrad Molden: Kom ikke her og play King Carrot
Description: After 12 years Conrad still thinks Denmark is a strange yet dejlig land. He’s impressed locals taken the time to learn Danish, loves to say “vampyr flagermus“, takes rugrød on holiday, thinks minimælk should always come in a small carton and drinks the DSB tap water (it’s cleaner than anything in England). He’s truly integrated. After four sold out national tours, Conrad will be back in your city but he won’t act like he’s better than other people. “King Carrot” is a very special show filled with his unique danglish ordforråd, lots of jokes and a hilarious international look at life in DK.

In the imposing Wiener Staatsoper, experience the intense tragedy of Otello, played by Jonas Kaufmann, where jealousy and intrigue unleash a spiral of destruction. From the sublime performance of General Otello to the machinations of the evil Iago, this Verdi opera immerses you in a world of unleashed passions and deadly betrayals.

Film_title: Inside the Oasis: The Story of South Florida's Gay Mecca
Description: Narrated by Emmy-winning actor Sharon Gless, INSIDE THE OASIS: The Story of South Florida’s Gay Mecca explores the LGBTQ+ community’s evolution in Broward County from the 1950s to the present. Through archival footage and firsthand accounts, the film charts the fight against discrimination, the triumph of visibility, and the fragile nature of progress as newly emboldened political forces once again challenge the community’s hard-won rights.
In this Cinderella story set in a mythical West African kingdom. The prince, heir to the throne, and an orphaned maiden, must overcome numerous obstacles in their quest to find true love.
The tantric edition of Transistors
Streaming LIVE and FREE on TNA digital platforms, the action begins on Countdown To Genesis. Get ready for Genesis with exclusive matches and previews.

Follow comedian Theodore M.E. Taylor as he discusses cultural and political differences, the pressures of poverty and passing in affluent company, and code switching and shaping identity around social prejudices.

A father and son's aspirations in baseball clash with corrupt authority figures, a league commissioner and school superintendent, who abuse their power, forcing them to persist through adversity to achieve their goals.

"Car Show Kings" is a captivating urban drama that combines the passion for classic cars, the pursuit of dreams, and the transformative power of love, delivering a thrilling narrative set against the backdrop of Pompano Beach, FL.
A tender portrait of childhood’s first encounter with love, loss, and the memories that remain.

Jim, a drunk with the ability to walk through walls, has just quit his job at the carnival so he can catch a serial killer known as The Northside Butcher. We follow Jim as he gets a job at the shit factory, binge drinks, and struggles to pay the rent on his dismal, 50-dollar-a-week room.
Lindsay Mallyn is back on the air and taking more calls of the supernatural from the people of Circle City in this hair-raising, horror anthology.

Film_title: The Inheritance (A Found Footage Horror Film)
Description: When James Mills inherits a forgotten desert property, he documents the trip-only to encounter ghostly children, strange time-warped objects, and a silent cult stalking him through the night.

Inside a prison, a young man confronts the emotional wreckage of his crime through sessions with the prison psychologist-reliving the past, facing the pain he caused, and search for redemption in the aftermath of a life-altering choice.

Film_title: The Movie That Was Never Made
Description: A film with no beginning, no end, no cast, no crew just the haunting idea of a movie that was never made and can never be remembered.

Film_title: For the Record, It was Me
Description: Sasha, an average high schooler, has recently befriended her classmate Cameron, a smooth talker that's as cool as a cucumber. But over time, Sasha begins to realize that there's more to Cameron than initially thought.

A high risk prison break spirals into chaos when a ruthless crew takes on the impossible: extract the most wanted inmate in the country and escape under heavy fire. With cops swarming, helicopters crashing, and no room for error, survival means thinking fast and shooting faster. Every second counts, and the only way out is through.

Film_title: Confessions of a Menopausal Femme Fatale
Description: CONFESSIONS OF A MENOPAUSAL FEMME FATALE is a fearless stand-up storytelling concert film in which Shakoor uses raw honesty, wit, music, and personal narrative to share her 12-year journey through menopause—a transformative experience that reshaped her identity as a woman, mother, artist, and human being. Framed around a return trip to Hawaii nearly 40 years after she once called it home, the story unfolds when a panic attack triggers deep introspection, forcing Shakoor to confront unresolved struggles, including addiction, postpartum depression, loss, and self-reinvention. Through wit, song, and unflinching truth, Shakoor breaks the silence surrounding menopause in a powerful performance that challenges stigma, invites laughter, and inspires radical self-acceptance.
Studios: The Secret Society Of Twisted Storytellers
Confessions of a Menopausal Femme Fatale

Description: A contemplation on the deceit of vision, visual systems, and mediums.
2 Sides to Every Story

Film_title: No Pardon Needed with Tyler Fischer
Description: Fox Nation celebrates Comedy Month with a new look at politics and culture through the comedic genius of Tyler Fischer. Known for his spot-on impressions, this is a one of a kind inauguration send-up.
After being released from prison, the son of a murdered mob boss returns to take over his family's criminal empire and hunt down those responsible for his father's death.

When King Ansa betrayed his subjects, his mother is left with one choice only: love her son and look away or twist the fate of her son for the good of the people Will the kingdom crumble, or will a hidden truth change everything?

Andrew and Katya's relationship is on the rocks. Her friend Iliana has overstayed her welcome in their tiny apartment. When Katya has to leave to care for a sick relative, Andrew and Iliana are forced to figure out how to live together.
The film follows two wanderers over the course of an entire day, moving through different spaces and occupying their leisure.

When a struggling theater actor loses his job, Nate Nickels, played by Tony Monreal, transitions to a new role into independent cinema. He is met up with Lucas Tarantella, played by Caleb Ebner, an indie filmmaker who’s known for his controversial art. As Nate struggles to keep up with Lucas’ strict rules, tensions rise and the rest of the cast struggles to “stay in character”. With Lucas’ secret intentions, nobody really knows what evil goes on behind the scenes…
A previously unknown short by Gunvor Nelson, discovered in 2023 along with approximately 150 rolls of film in her apartment.

Film_title: Snow Bunny Chronicle: Looks Do Kill
Description: Madison, a serial killer, goes on a killing spree in Dallas. An activist by the name of Asaad suspects that his cousin may be one of her victims. He seeks the help of Det. Caleb to help him figure out what happened to his cousin.

Dreamality is a coming-of-age psychological drama about Ben, an incoming senior whose subconscious begins to overtake his waking life. As ambition, fear, and friendship collide, he must decide what’s real, what’s imagined, and what he’s willing to lose to achieve control.
After their parent’s death, Katie Behnan cares for her sister Megan, with early onset Alzheimer’s. As the disease progresses, it takes a physical, emotional, and social toll.

When James Conrad's wife, Kristina, goes missing, he is interrogated by detectives and he finds out she may have been keeping secrets from him. James learns about a man named Ben Novack, who may have been Kristina's lover on the side. As he digs deeper, he finds out that the bond between husband and wife isn't as strong as he thought.
Haunted by his friend's disappearance, CB is drawn into a dangerous rabbit hole with deadly roadblocks and buried secrets, where the truth may be far more painful than he ever imagined.

Film_title: Backstreet Boys Into the Millennium: Las Vegas Sphere
Description: A spacefaring concert where the Backstreet Boys take fans on a journey through their career, using futuristic visuals and classic hits to tell a cosmic story.
A power-hungry First Lady's quest for control unravels when a murder investigation threatens to expose the deadly secrets behind her glamorous facade.
A documentary film celebrating 25 years of a life-changing arts camp in New Hampshire called Creative Arts at Keene.

Film_title: Geraldine Hickey: Don't Tease Me About My Gloves
Description: As seen on the Melbourne Comedy Festival Gala and various television appearances, join Geraldine Hickey for an hour of smart, observational comedy at its absolute best.

Six chapters of the film oscillate between what is lost and what is found across the same ancestral plane. There is everything to see yet nothing there, but briefly in transit you might have already experienced all of it, all at once.
A woman employs a priest to exorcise her home, but discovers squatters instead of ghosts.
Vital depicts a black birthing person’s first prenatal visit.

Film_title: Women Who Will, Women Who Won't
Description: A circle of friends unravels when hidden shames ignite lust, betrayal, and deadly jealousy, turning loyalty into a fight for survival.

Teenage boy Jake navigates his way through Secondary School in Glasgow and the violent culture. Jake becomes more and more involved in the fighting scene after being persuaded by his best friend Camron to fight a classmate in his school...
Three friends experience a terrifying series of events at an alien-themed roadside motel built atop a rumored UFO crash site.

After two decades of primarily showing people dying in only two dimensions, Fantastic Fest finally delivers a show devoted to in-your-face 3-D carnage! Presented in glorious anaglyph, you’ll have a front-row seat to more dismemberments and impalements than you can shake a parallax at. Your guides through decades of slaughter are third-dimensional enthusiasts David (D.S.) Cohen, George Hickman, and Maxim & Nick Pozderac, who have sifted through countless hours of stereoscopic cinema to bring you the most eye-popping kills and the finest depth-of-field demises. This is DEATH BY STEREOSCOPY!

A sweet suburban housewife's world turns upside down when she accidentally kills her best friend while preparing for her wedding anniversary party. She must cover up her crime and sell her house to resolve her husbands wrongdoings.

Lady Watts, a bestselling author, reveals secrets about her affairs with those closest to her in her latest memoir. At her launch party, a heated argument turns violent, and she's left unconscious. As detectives investigate, secrets, love triangles, and betrayal emerge. The search for the attacker leads to twists and turns, involving everyone from her talent manager to her labelmate. The truth about the night of the attack is slowly revealed, with unexpected consequences for all involved.
An intrepid journalist shadows a group of ghost hunters as they conduct paranormal investigations at some of Britain's most haunted sites and buildings.
TBC

Derek, a devoted father and rising corporate star, lives the dream in suburban Detroit until Jay, a troubled high school teammate, returns. Nostalgia turns to obsession that threatens Derek's marriage, career and son.
When a classmate gets in her way, a true crime-obsessed teenage girl goes to extreme lengths to create her very own true crime.
A young man with money troubles takes an online job with a bizarre twist.

This sequel to 626 is a Comedic horror film that follows a group of galactic federation members who just defeated the most indestructible experiment in the universe. Now they have a new threat, experiment 624. This time the threat is not only indestructible, she has powers without limit.
A man comes back from the wilderness.
The Crackers return for one final outing. Will they win? Will they survive? We genuinely don't know.
A musical film compiled of ten shorts based around music by Aaron Szyszko. A sequel to Breaking the Shell.

Film_title: Comic Relief: Even More Funny for Money
Description: Comedian Rosie Ramsey takes a look back at the highlights of this year's charity extravaganza, reliving an incredible night of fundraising, comedy and entertainment.

Film_title: In The Light Of The Moon
Description: After losing the love of his life, Anton captures the woman who took her. Now he must find a way to save his love before it is too late.

Film_title: Puzzled - Paths are made by walking
Description: Even when two hearts experience the same thing, they beat in their own unique way. A story about the realistic present and the idealized past. As a couple puts together a puzzle, their different emotional perceptions and memories come to light. An intimate drama unfolds about love, acceptance, and the question of whether the individual pieces of the relationship will ever come together to form a complete picture.

Ancient Caledonia 210AD. A young Roman Soldier is the lone survivor of a brutal shipwreck. He is injured and broken but not alone. The savage Pict inhabitants ensnare him in their gruesome blood sport, unflinching and persevering he will do anything to make it back to his beloved. throughout his perilous and unsettling journey he finds hope in the most unexpected of places.

Film_title: The Great Debate - Tweeters Vs. Tik Tokers
Description: Two “generations” of online creator royalty face off in a debate over dumb things you’ve never thought about before. It's the Tweet-ers vs the Tok-ers! (Psst: it’s not about age. It’s about vibes.) Six panelists. Zero chill. Everything on the line in hopes of being crowned our next Master Debate
Every empire needs an emperor. Watch how far Shah is willing to go to claim the crown!
When their high school group chat gets leaked, four childhood best friends reunite for the first time in seven years to find the culprit.

Film_title: How to Save the Immortal 2:  Elixer of Life
Description: Drybone the Immortal and Shieldmaiden Barbara are preparing for their wedding, but not all Barbara's relatives are happy about the union. Her strong-willed aunt, Queen Brungilda, believes her niece deserves a more suitable match. In a misguided attempt to stop the wedding, she unwittingly casts a powerful sleeping charm on Barbara. The Queen proclaims that the legendary Elixir of Life can save Barbara, but only a truly noble knight will survive the treacherous path to the Elixir, hidden in a perilous place where danger lurks at every turn. Drybone, known as a dark sorcerer, stands no chance in this noble quest, so he enlists Elijah, a true and valiant knight but clumsy and fearful, to join him. In a tale filled with action, magic, and humor, only a true hero can save Barbara and restore peace and joy to the kingdom.

Film_title: Foster The People: Paradise State of Mind Tour - Live From Razzmatazz Barcelona (July 17, 2025)
Description: SET LIST: 00:03 - Feed Me 03:49 - Lost in Space 08:13 - Helena Beat 12:28 - Glitchzig 18:00 - Waste 26:12 - Coming of Age 30:31 - Miss You 34:43 - Pseudologia Fantastica 41:11 - Houdini 44:32 - Call It What You Want 48:38 - The Truth 52:49 - Lamb’s Wool 57:59 - Don’t Stop (Color on the Walls) 1:01:40 - Lotus Eater 1:05:20 - Time to Get Closer 1:06:55 - A Diamond to Be Born 1:14:57 - Fire Escape 1:19:35 - Sit Next to Me 1:23:38 - Pumped Up Kicks

When the owner of a home study academy for wayward girls is faced with looming debt, he has no choice but to enlist the help of John Mahler, a lone educator with a heart of gold. Principal Kevin Stevenson and Dr. Bill Race are confronted by Mr. Frank who wants his money. Unable to pay, Stevenson makes the call to Mahler. What follows is a story of hope, help, and inspiration as Mahler helps all of the students and (against all odds) will try to clear them for release, which will help Stevenson be able to take care of his debt. Starring Johnny Mask, Bryan Brewer, Chris Spinelli, Sofia Studenikina, Sofia Papuashvili, Jamie Grefe, and Hazel Gonzalez, BAD GIRLS GO HOME is a vertical feature film unlike anything you've ever seen before. Filled with drama, heartfelt emotion, human conflict, and heartwarming inspiration, BAD GIRLS GO HOME will inspire you to do better and to be better.
An animated scientific exploration into the wondrous age of microplastics that explores their many benefits to humanity.
Big Rip and Boss Lady are two rivals who battle for power. As Boss Lady rises to the top, her enemies close in, and the 'presha' turns on her.
Leigh-Anne performs at Reading Festival, on the Chevron stage.

Film_title: Beyond the Headlines: The NABJ Journey
Description: Since its inception, the National Association of Black Journalists (NABJ) has been a pivotal organization in providing career development opportunities for Black journalists, students, and communications professionals globally. As a leading advocate for Black media professionals, NABJ has ensured that its members have a voice in the global news media landscape. On the eve of NABJ's 50th anniversary, this film tells the story of the courageous 44 founders and enduring impact they’ve had on the media profession.

On the brink of homelessness, Ruby goes to stay with her pregnant baby sister and husband after the death of their alcoholic father. Her theatrical presence and blatant lies quickly cause problems as a distraught Ruby tries to hide her vulnerable circumstance in hopes of being saved by showbusiness.

Told through the first-person lens of first love, this film follows Crosley, a theater worker stuck in nostalgia for a time when life felt full—surrounded by friends, pursuing dreams, and in love. As memories of youth haunt him, Crosley must confront a quiet crisis: is it better to chase passion, or simply hold on to what once brought joy?

Australian Prime Minister Peter Carrington is having his worst day in office since being elected after his attempt to kill Centrelink is shot down by the senate. With the party in crisis, he turns to his Chief of Staff, Tim, and his assistant, Shay (a supposed diversity hire), for answers. Carrington, however, must remember that there is always a higher power to answer to.
Studios: Australian Film Television and Radio School

Description: When two best friends, Matt and Alan, smoke weed-laced cigarettes, things take a bizarre turn. Alan, high out of his mind, runs off in the streets of suburban Arizona. Left behind and still dazed, the anxious and reluctant Matt is forced to search for his missing friend.
A group of friends attend a house party. Waiting through the doors is a wild night, an ex-girlfriend, and n***a zombies.
After being the only survivor of an airplane crash, a young girl is convinced everyone dead during the incident is still alive and will fight to prove this feeling.

The Dungeon Diaries X plunges audiences into the unraveling mind of a woman lost in her own inner chaos. In the heart of the metropolis, she searches for love, but addiction and paranoia twist her reality into a waking nightmare. As the voices in her head grow stronger, she descends deeper into a surreal labyrinth, torn between the desperate need for connection and the sinister force urging her to take control—at any cost. A gripping tale of obsession, mental descent, and the terrifying lengths one will go to in order to possess love, The 7 acts of desire blur the line between desire and destruction.

The Year is 2003, Harris, recently promoted to A.S.G. Special forces, is sent on a mission by The General to to take down The Mewing Society, Led by the Silent, Mew Master. Charismatic second hand man, The Pleasure Master, And the new guy, The Gooner. their plan, to rot everyone's brains with slang such as Skibidi and Rizz. In the Forest Harris, Code named Viper, teams up with old friends, Johnson Large the medic, and The hand to hand specialist, Max Stone, Viper fights foes like the Figster, Discovers shocking betrayals and tremendous losses, and Discovers he's in way over his head. All this, in a deeply satirical action thriller.

Malcolm Hawkins is an upcoming crime drama directed by Phillip Penza, featuring veteran actor Eric Roberts in a pivotal role. The film is currently available on the Roku Channel, with releases on Prime Video and Tubi expected soon.

Film_title: Stand by for Action! 2: Tunes of Danger
Description: Step into the timeless world of Gerry Anderson’s TV shows in a brand-new 2024 celebration as a full orchestra brings iconic theme tunes and music to life. Feel the pulse of Thunderbirds, the mysterious allure of Stingray and the futuristic vibes of Space: 1999. Immerse yourself in a symphonic journey through Anderson’s imaginative universes where each note conjures memories of daring rescues, epic space adventures and puppetry magic.
A smooth-talking professor juggles multiple women until one snaps, forcing him to face the ultimate price for playing with their hearts.

With their mom gone, Clara cares for her younger sister Ruby while starting senior year. Struggling to give love and support, the pressure builds until buried trauma surfaces and Clara spirals toward her breaking point.
A detective on the brink of solving a series of ritual child murders is forced to choose between his faith in the material world and his fear of the uncanny.

Louisiana Mediumistic Communicator and FBI Agent Justice Brown is burdened with the task of solving the cases of three different female vocal apparitions, who allege that they were killed and buried in Bar Harbor, Maine by a local park ranger named Auggie Doggett. And now Agent Brown must bring the killer to justice.
During a Gershwin recording session, Ella Fitzgerald sings her love songs, scatting through her darkest notes.

A man revives his drought-stricken village by creating a forest. Years later, his granddaughter returns as a teacher. Their peaceful life faces threats when a corporation wants the forest's resources.

Film_title: A letter to you - a short college film
Description: Nancy is a young girl in 1950s England, she gets invited to a dinner party off an old friend but little does she know she's in for a surprise

Film_title: Linkin Park - Live from Corona Capital 2025
Description: The band headlines Mexico City's Corona Capital festival for the first time on November 16, 2025.
A Man sits at a bench everyday waiting and watching

Film_title: The Devil Makes Work For Idle Hands
Description: A man on parole, a struggling mother, and a pair of drug dealing brothers each become part of a dizzying multiplicity of plots, but one story. "The Devil Makes Work For Idle Hands" is a working class drama which focuses on social mobility, disillusionment, and the struggles of working class people. Seen through the perspectives of three characters, the film is loosely based on real life events and uses a mixture of professional and first time actors.

A fantasy story took place in an unknown futuristic time, after many wars and deadly pandemics that lasted for decades, an expedition from outside the planet is trying to find the living remains of the human race on planet Earth, the inevitable message of these kinds of stories is well known and anticipates the end of humanity. A SOLAV STUDIOS PRODUCTION WRITTEN BY: KHALIL SAEED RIZQ AND MAHER ASAAD BAKER PRODUCED BY: FUAD AL-QRIZE ANIMATION SUPERVISOR: YAZAN MAHER BAKER DIRECTED BY: MAHER ASAAD BAKER
Short film screened at Chicago Horror Film Festival 2025 about a woman in recovery from addiction using a mindfulness app.

In the Benin Empire of 1897, an orphan girl discovers she holds the power of the sacred Aruosa stone. As the Oba faces British conquest and betrayal from within, she must embrace her destiny to save the kingdom.

Rue stumbles upon a box buried in the Outer Banks, she unknowingly unearths a history that leads to a masked killer hunting her down. Alone and terrified, Rue must fight to survive and uncover the secrets before it's too late.

After their mother's passing, Hea Cheng and Hea Li chose a burial site, believing it would bring peace and prosperity. Their youngest brother, overlooked due to his poverty, seemed unimportant. Years later, their fortunes crumbled while he thrived. When the grave was disturbed, unsettling truths emerged, revealing hidden betrayals and deep family rifts.

In the wake of a devastating loss, a widowed mother is left to navigate the complexities of life with her two children. She is determined to provide stability and find love again. New love is sometimes not what it seems.
Mrs. Weekley starts an affair with a young writer named D.H. Lawrence.

In the most advanced underwater base in the world, Titania, something has been unleashed now a team of experts, will have to discover who or what is trying to kill them, a journey into the delusions of the mind that will surround the team.

A spirited coming-of-age drama, set in rural Lagos, follows a resourceful young girl whose life is transformed when she harnesses tech and AI innovations to overcome poverty’s relentless setbacks. Blending heartfelt storytelling with high-tension wonder, the film shows how creativity and hope can turn poverty into a thing of the past.
a group of college students put their paranormal skepticism to the test across two infamous British locations
From NFL superstardom to public collapse, Out of Bounds: In Search of Antonio Brown examines fame, trauma, CTE speculation, and what happens when football ends.

On the stage of the Finnish National Opera, Mexican-Finnish choreographer Javier Torres López transposes the legendary romantic ballet to 1950s Italy. A feminist reinterpretation, faithful to the captivating beauty of the original.
Upcoming animated short by NickCraftNL

In Miami’s neon-lit streets, “EXOTIC” follows Alejandro Vasquez, a charismatic entrepreneur leading a double life. Publicly, he runs an exotic car rental business, but secretly, he operates a criminal organization for the Calamar Cartel. His life is upended when Isabella, a New York journalist, arrives to expose Miami’s underworld. As she gets closer to the truth, tensions rise and loyalties are tested. “EXOTIC” is a thrilling tale of crime and redemption, blurring the line between hero and villain against Miami’s glamorous backdrop.

Film_title: Marcus Miller @ TSF Jazz Chantilly Festival 2025
Description: The celebrated New York bassist Marcus Miller, steeped in jazz and soul, delivers a generous performance for the TSF Jazz Chantilly Festival audience.

Director: Mario Zampi, A. Barr-Smith et al
Description: It's back! A fourth compelling collection of SHORT SHARP SHOCKS revisits the heyday of the supporting program with a compendium of eerie and eccentric British short films presented for the first time in High Definition. Well-known names to spot include Patrick Macnee, John Le Mesurier, Gabrielle Drake and Elspeth Gray. Settle in for a strange cinematic journey through uncanny stories, twists in the tale, low-budget weirdness and oodles of atmosphere.

Film_title: Unwrapping King Tut: Secrets of the Mummy
Description: On the 100th anniversary of Howard Carter first unwrapping the mummy of Tutankhamun, Dr Xand van Tulleken sets out to reexamine the six extraordinary days it took to reveal the Boy King beneath the bandages.

An anti-government provocateur masquerading as Roxy Cotton, just another girl with a peep show on Only Fans, the London-based subscription service that caters to sex workers. She preaches Conservatism and anti-governmental conspiracies.

Film_title: The White Stripes: Get Behind Me Satan XX
Description: Behind-the-scenes footage during the "Get Behind Me Satan" era of the White Stripes' career, from studio footage to live footage.
The ghost with the most is back
Chat Pile performing at Primavera Sound Porto in June 2025 at the Super Block Stage.
Struggling to connect with his dad emotionally, DJ is faced with molestation from a close friend of the family. Everything unfolds after a tragic accident.
16 Classic Chicago dog joints. 2 hot dog journalists at the top of their game.

Beatrice, a jaded film editor, works late on her latest project when her computer glitches, showing films she didn't edit. Aided by a mysterious figure, she must unravel the secret of these cursed films in this darkly comedic anthology.
A narrative short film.
Studios: Florida State University College of Motion Picture Arts

Description: 'Punchlines & Patriots' is unapologetically American. Join Sean Hannity and Jimmy Failla, for a night of liberty, laughs, and a whole lot of winning. Only on Fox Nation.
Reboot of the Project Thorn duology
HOW FAR WOULD YOU GO? An unstable girl gets an unthinkable offer. Now, without any more restraint, and in pursuit of a sadistic bargain, she quickly takes herself to dark places

While searching for clues to her uncle Ben’s mysterious death, filmmaker Ari discovers boxes of family letters tucked away in a farmhouse attic. With these as her guide, she dives into the quickly fading past to uncover the connecting thread between Ben’s death in 1975, her family’s time as Mennonite missionaries in Ethiopia, and the downfall of Haile Selassie, Ethiopia’s last king. The search reveals the enduring impact of family separation, cultural dislocation, and unresolved grief - while also illuminating the fragile but powerful possibility of intergenerational healing.

A Detective searches for a Psychotic serial killer, a Scientist grieving a loss constructs a catastrophic machine, and obscure entities wander strange lands lost in time and space. These stories are woven together into a single saga of darkness, time travel, and subliminal existence.
After an harrowing night, a young woman in New York City learns how to stand her ground.
Chyna endures a with Mark. Her sisters plan to seek revenge, but Detective Rivera intervenes. With the support of her friend Adriana, Chyna gains the confidence to finally leave Mark for good.
Consumed by grief after Boss Man's betrayal destroys his trust, the once-loyal Baby sets out to seek revenge, leaving a bloody trail.

Film_title: Florence PD: The Jim Wolowitz Story
Description: In the dusty backwaters of Florence, Kentucky, Patrol Officer Jim Wolowitz is the last guy you’d trust with a badge and unfortunately, the only person left wearing one. When a string of increasingly bizarre crimes rocks the town—a panty theft epidemic, illegal moonshine being sold to children, and missing racehorses turning up in Chinese food—Jim is forced to unravel a tangled conspiracy involving local weirdos, an unstable sheriff, and a shadowy notebook that seems to connect it all. Soon, Jim will have to face his ultimate fear: actual police work.

In a remote inn, Alex Whittaker (Paul LeMat) and three other gifted psychics are investigating rumors that the secret of life has been discovered by the mysterious master puppeteer Andre Toulon (William Hickey). But the psychics quickly discover Toulon's secret of death in the form of five killer puppets...each one uniquely qualified for murder and mayhem.
A run-in at a coffee shop between a married, self-made millionaire and her down-and-out ex-bestie invites revenge, lies and betrayal into her home.
In pursuit of his dream of becoming a famous chef, a naive French immigrant unknowingly takes a job for New York's most powerful gangster. Both of their world's collide in this crime comedy
A short thriller film.

Freshly dumped, the only thing that cheers John up is a weekly delivery of tomatoes from his eccentric neighbour Pat. When John witnesses a home invasion, he gets more than he bargained for: the well-kept secret behind Pat's prizewinning produce.

A young boy who is a victim of bullying hopes his mother's magic potion will make him a war hero like his father, but in the end discovers that all he needed was to believe in himself. Not your typical coming of age story, Sgt. Fruit Fly shows what happens when a boy can just be a boy.

Lunga is excited to join a Soccer Club but is selected for the D team. His father will see this as a failure, a team with girls and a female coach. When bullies try to keep him off the field, it's only his father who can help. But will he?
A couple's marriage finds itself at a crossroads when memories of the past threaten to overwhelm their future.

Naguib and his wife Mariam decide to take over a dangerous Journey to the United States starting from central America all the way to the US - Mexico Border facing many tough life threatening obstacles.
A story loosely involving Lime bikes made under the influence of alcohol.

Hired as a Corporate Moralist, new grad Alex must navigate the comedic complexities of Angels, Demons and questions of self to create the perfect work-Afterlife balance without jeopardising the profit margins of Saviour and Sons Ltd.
The very top collection of most songs and music of Enigma.
A movie with Jimmie Falls, Sean San Jose, and Emmy Newman.
A year after escaping a fatal masquerade ball, Nora gets death threats. When the stalker targets her mother instead, she must confront a killer determined to end her life.
Texas Ollie, a film about a cowboy, not any cowboy but a Donegal cowboy. This hour-long documentary starring Ollie Hepburn and showcases his life and love for horses.

Film_title: Empire Of The Sun live at Cercle Odyssey
Description: Empire of the Sun recently announced Chrysalis, a curated three-day destination event they've built for fans to step through the door into a universe of rebirth and creative awakening. Three unique and exclusive performances by Empire Of The Sun and more artists to be announced. May 14 - 16, 20261 San Jose Del Cabo, MX. Empire Of The Sun brought their visionary music to Cercle Odyssey, transforming the space into a Miracle Room where light, sound and movement became one.
When her sister Menil vanishes from their Southern California Indian Reservation, Nesune embarks on a frantic search to find her, a journey that takes her beyond the limits of the physical world.

Film_title: The Path of Titans Movie 2 - AGE OF THE APEXES
Description: The Guardians of Gondwa return to Panjura only to find evil forces waiting for them, preparing for a mysterious reckoning. It's up to our heroes to save their home.
A young man stumbles into good fortune but it attracts the wrong attention.
Teens head out into the woods to find a crashed meteorite and instead come across the survivor of a massacre and its perpetrator, the killer in the woods.
Convinced he’s a robot, a man desperately visits a doctor for answers he has trouble believing.
Three friends meet up at a donut shop and talk about life.
An argumentative couple spend a weekend away camping, only to be confronted by a crazed bush-dwelling madman who warns them of an ever-encroaching creature: the Wombo.

Jameisha Prescod’s exploration of the legacies of medical colonialism in Suriname and its attempts to classify and control black bodies centres the experiences of Afro-Surinamese and Maroon communities living in the Netherlands, including the voice of poet Carina Fernandes. Foregrounding personal responses to illness, spirituality, and medicine, Prescod reclaims health as a practice of memory and care where survival alone is understood as a radical inheritance.

The short film, The Cancer Card follows the story Benny, a cancer fighter, who seeks out advice from Tony, a cancer survivor, on how to deal with the overwhelming negative effects, and surprising perks that come with fighting the disease.

Ryanna, wakes up one morning to receive a phone call, that her husband is kidnapped. The kidnapper is demanding Ryanna to do some horrible, disturbing things to people on the list he created. Ryanna has to now choose between her husband and strangers. Who to save.
Brady an 18 year old whom struggles with lust attends a bible study to start a relationship with the Lord.

The Konzerthausorchester Berlin, conducted by Joana Mallwitz, opens the 2025–2026 season with Maurice Ravel's hypnotic Boléro. This will be followed by Bryce Dessner's Piano Concerto, inspired and performed by pianist Alice Sara Ott. Also on the programme: Anna Meredith's Nautilus, a work brimming with energy, and Ludwig van Beethoven's First Symphony.

Norma is a woman torn between two systems. As a chaste druid priestess, she decides on war and peace in an occupied land; secretly, she’s the lover of Roman commander Pollione and mother of his two children. Her double life unravels when Pollione plans to leave her for the younger priestess Adalgisa. Caught between love and vengeance, faith and reason, tradition and empire, Norma nearly kills her children—before choosing another, equally radical path. Vincenzo Bellini’s 1831 opera is a masterpiece of Italian Romanticism. The role of Norma, with its emotional and vocal range from bel canto to raw outcry, is iconic. Director Vasily Barkhatov sets the tragedy amid political upheaval, where old idols are replaced by new. Star soprano Asmik Grigorian debuts in the title role. Adalgisa is sung by Aigul Akhmetshina.
While the boys were chatting, Alvian Supra was asked if he had prayed yesterday. He simply replied that God did not exist and swear on it.

A series of murders takes place in a hotel on Christmas Eve. Survivors are taken for interrogation. Each of the survivors tells a different side of the story, but the FBI agent is more interested in the story between the lines.

Based On The Novel By Janelle Whitney Love Is Pain Follows 2 Timelines One In 1994 When 18 Year Old Shay Evans And Her Boyfriend Carson Shaw Break Up And Navigate Through Their Breakup The Next Storyline Follows A Stripper Named Hailey Lucas Who Is On The Run From Her Abusive Husband Justin Flay After Being Fed Up With The Abuse She Flees Off To Tucson And Meets Colton Lainie A Bull Rider Who Instantly Falls For Him But Is Afraid That She Will Repeat The Patterns Of Her Husband
After being threatened with losing his job, a New York journalist travels to Piedmont, California—only to uncover that the quiet little town hides far more than it lets on.
West Texas, a land of Oil and Blood. Rian is thrust into the center of a diabolical plot between two feuding Oil Barons, she must do everything she can to survive. For this is a Land of Wolves.

Film_title: La Scala: The Name Of The Rose
Description: Captured live from Milan, Damiano Michieletto world premiere production of Francesco Filidei's new opera, based on Umberto Eco's medievel thriller.

Film_title: A Day at Oak Street Beach
Description: 9 in the morning to 9 at night from one spot at Oak Street Beach in Laguna Beach, California
A traveler from the future wanders through Argentina, while the world is on the brink of an atomic war.

InhuMaine is a powerful documentary that examines the growing homelessness crisis in Bangor. Filmed locally, it contrasts the natural beauty of iconic locations like Mount Katahdin and Cadillac Mountain with the stark reality faced by unhoused individuals living in encampments. Through intimate interviews with residents, advocates, nonprofit workers, and State Senator Joe Baldacci, the film exposes the systemic challenges and personal stories behind the crisis. InhuMaine offers a sobering look at the hidden darkness within so-called Vacationland, urging viewers to see beyond the postcard-perfect views and confront an urgent need for change. -NB, TL, JP, BW

A film that explores the conflict between justice and equity in Sri Lanka, highlighting the struggle of locals (Eelam Tamil inhabitants) for their basic needs against a group of elites who exploit them for their own enrichment.
Substance-dependent single mother Sin is trapped in a toxic relationship and must find a way to end it before it kills her.
An experimental film made over the course of 8 years, filmed in Oregon, California, Scotland, and New York.

Film_title: The Blind: A Phil Robertson Tribute
Description: The Blind returns to theaters as a powerful celebration of the life and legacy of Phil Robertson.
A theatre company’s modern spin on Shakespeare’s ‘Taming of the Shrew’ gives Vic, the assistant stage manager, a new outlook on art and her own life.
A handmade horror movie about an amateur filmmaker's doomed attempt to mount a Dogme production.
Ryan struggles with the loss of his sister, Julia, from her abusive relationship and remembers why he feels it's his fault.
