Film_title: Asaf Avidan, Sounds Like Art @ Moderne Galerie, Saarbrücken
Description: At the Saarland Modern Galerie in Saarbrücken, Germany, songs from Unfurl, Asaf Avidan's new album, blend with masterpieces from a contemporary art collection that is as socially conscious as it is inspiring.
When young Diamond finds herself unhomed, she’s offered an unconventional way to get back on her feet and make a better life for herself.

A devoted brother with fractured memories sets out to recover a long-lost priceless artifact to fund his little brother's dream, uncovering old memories and the truth about his absent father along the way.

A fearless Philly detective is sent to Atlanta after a botched drug bust. She clashes with a rising kingpin-who's dating her estranged sister-forcing her to choose between justice and family in a city where survival comes at gunpoint.

Dennis Rodríguez, manager and sole employee of a family business he must save from foreclosure, receives the news that his girlfriend is pregnant, but she doesn't want a child. Dennis decides to take on this challenge: he will be both a father and a mother to that baby, which leads him to embark on a new path full of surprises that will radically change him.

Film_title: Def Leppard Radio 2 in the Park 2025
Description: British rock legends Def Leppard headline Sunday at Radio 2 in the Park 2025 in Chelmsford.
Two bumbling photographers are hired for a blackmail job—but their simple gig soon spirals into chaos and danger.

Film_title: China, der Riese erwacht - TikTok, die mächtigste App der Welt
Description: TikTok’s explosive success isn’t just the triumph of a single company. The video platform also holds major political significance for its country of origin—China—challenging the United States’ long-standing dominance in the digital sphere. In this new power struggle between the two global giants, the battle centers around the collection and use of personal data...
In this 65 minute documentary, Carl Diehl chronicles the histories of his grand-uncle — the magician, vaudevillian, and comedy emcee, Werner “Dorny” Dornfield (1892 -1982).

Film_title: Christmas on the Farm with Jill Wagner and Family
Description: Jill Wagner and her husband invite you onto their farm to celebrate their family traditions and experience their small-town community as they celebrate the true meaning of Christmas.

Film_title: The Worst of Yucko the Clown
Description: Yucko the Clown, as seen on the Howard Stern show, travels the USA and roasts anyone and everyone in his path!

Discover the unknown hitmakers behind radio’s biggest songs, LIVE from Nashville! Hosted by Bobby Bones, enjoy stories and performances from award-winning songwriters behind hits for Carrie Underwood, Reba, Kenny Chesney, and more. Don’t miss this incredible one-of-a-kind LIVE broadcast event. Presented by the Nashville Music Network™!
Ryder Stone is a secret agent with a simple retrieval mission that spirals into chaos.

Film_title: Samara Joy at Royal Albert Hall
Description: A number one album and a double Grammy-win in 2023 put jazz vocalist Samara Joy on the map, officially establishing the Bronx native as the next jazz sensation and a legend in the making, with frequent comparisons to Ella Fitzgerald and Sarah Vaughan. Fresh from another double win at the 2025 Grammys, Joy makes her much-anticipated debut at London’s legendary Royal Albert Hall.

Film_title: Hiromi’s Sonicwonder - ARTE Concert Jazz sous les Pommiers 2025
Description: Hiromi takes the Jazz sous les Pommiers festival on a wild ride! A concert combining virtuosity and humour, driven by the energy of the album Sonicwonderland.
From Sabbath to solo, addiction to redemption, the chaotic rise and fall of rock's Prince of Darkness.
A man spirals into his imagination when he struggles to make sense of an impending divorce, and the loss of love.
A young Maori man is kidnapped by a Pākehā Doctor, who will stop at nothing to further his understanding of race relations in New Zealand.

Commander Star Shark, Guppy, and the rest of the Star Shark Squad are locked in a tooth-to-fin battle with Lord Sword, Dr. Dorsal Fin, and their army of goblin sharks bent on devouring the universe! Or at least that's what you would see if legendary producer Richie Dante didn't blow the budget on his pooch Bobby Barko's endless supply of gourmet dog chow. Instead, strap yourself in for a movie that never quite made it to the stars but did manage some of the biggest names in the squared circle!

A young woman whose harrowing report of seeing a baby stranded on a highway sparks a nationwide response. As police, volunteers, and well-meaning strangers mobilize to search donations flood in, and a GoFundMe campaign takes off, the public is swept into a wave of hope and empathy.
A man stalks the social media statuses of the women on his friends list and rescues those who post of their distress online by killing off their tormentors, regardless of reason.
A veteran detective and his rookie partner investigate a homicide case involving a vengeful kingpin who unleashes bloodshed across the city.
Andrew Finch relives a dinner with the Fargo's, as his fragile memories make it challenging to uncover the truth about that night.

After a semester at university, Carla joins her best friend and her boyfriend on a beach vacation. Carla is immediately attracted to Jake and uses him to get over her ex, Mike. She becomes entrenched in a love story that can only end in murder.
A story of the unspoken, unbreakable bond between twin brothers in the face of a deep tragedy.

In this lame brain comedy, Tommy D, a washed-up goofball hotel lounge singer and his band (Mikey and Stevie), are too oblivious to know they are out of style. After Tommy's girlfriend leaves and the band gets an eviction notice on their apartment door, Tommy needs to find money fast. While Tommy is eating three-day old pizza, a poster of his 1970's hero, the singer of Foreigner, Lou Graham, comes to life and gives him the cheat code to scoring the "big show in Vegas". As legends in their own minds, the band sets out on a cross- country road trip with stars in their eyes. The sleezeball trio gets into mischief every step of the way in this comedic hijinks romp.
The downfall of some of Britain's previously untouchable celebrities.

A research team makes a chilling discovery in the mountains: a prehistoric predator frozen in the ice. When it thaws out, the killing begins. But the nightmare doubles when they realize... it wasn’t alone.

Tashi and Sonam are late on rent. To make money, they get lured into spying for a super-secret organization by infiltrating a Tibetan speakeasy party in Queens - where personal data dictates life, death, and, most importantly, rent money.

Film_title: The Milk Carton Kids: Live From The Ryman
Description: The Milk Carton Kids perform at the Ryman Auditorium in Nashville, Tennessee, on February 1, 2024.
A church and a strip club in a small town have a rivalry.
Life for a happy couple is turned upside down after their young son is tragically murdered.
When a former kickboxing champion witnesses the murder of his best friend, he must do whatever it takes to survive and bring down the female crime Boss responsible for it.

Kim, a struggling college student, teams up with her best-friend Casey to make extra cash by delivering in a rural town outside of theirs for bigger tips, only to be met with a sinister secret the town holds.

Mr. and Mrs. Them, an uprooted couple move off of a Los Angeles city sidewalk in California where they've lived among the housed urban families, mom & pop shops. In the process, they negotiate the cement with a new property owner, police.

A modern romance unfolds against the backdrop of rival companies vying for cosmic dominance. With a dash of sci-fi, this tale blends corporate ambition and personal connections in a fresh take on love and space exploration.
In the Colorado Rockies, a researcher and his young protégé track a Sasquatch, uncovering the emotional depth of their adventure and the influence of fatherhood.

A young pastor discovers that his congregation's biggest temptation is an online cam model only to find himself drawn into her world, forcing him to question his faith, his future, and the institution he serves.
A photojournalist confronts the unchanging truth hidden in his lens.
In Lagos, successful businesswoman Adaora falls for seemingly perfect Jaiye. As their romance progresses, his controlling and manipulative behavior emerges, undermining her confidence.

Film_title: King Crimson: In the Wake of Poseidon
Description: The complete recording sessions of In The Wake of Poseidon on 1 CD/1Blu-ray. Blu-ray features completely new mixes of the album* in Dolby Atmos, 5.1 DTS-HD MA Surround & Hi-Res Stereo by Steven Wilson, (except Devil's Triangle*) New Elemental Mixes of four of the tracks in Hi-Res Stereo by David Singleton plus two additional versions of Cadence and Cascade. Complete recording sessions of the album in Hi-Res Stereo. The Original Stereo Master of the album (30th Anniversary edition). Presented in a replica mini-vinyl style packaging with booklet including photos and sleeve-notes from King Crimson biographer Sid Smith. CD contains the complete album in 2025 mix form with Devil's Triangle sourced from the alt mixes as featured originally on the (long unavailable) Sailors' Tales boxed set + the new Elemental Mixes.

The story opens as a seemingly naïve call girl escapes the clutches of a notorious gangster with a cell phone containing all his secrets. A 'tough-rough' female cop, who may or may-not be crooked, is given the job to "get the 'witness' to Detroit, on time and in one piece" to testify.
Aired on Fuori Orario on September 8th, 2025. Fulvio Baglivi and Franco Maresco talk about Maresco's latest movie, Bravo Bene!

Obi tries to balance making his wife, Labake, happy and paying bills by turning their house into a hotel called "Obi's Palace". Their marriage is tested when strange guests check in, putting them in funny and dangerous situations.
Every night Brodi Snook dreams of committing murder. Her doctor thinks she needs medication. Her best friend thinks she needs a new vibrator.

A traumatised and grief stricken Gab is recruited by ASIO to assist in the termination of an increasingly volatile old foe, stretching his fragile composure to breaking point in an apocalyptic final showdown.

A church group becomes stranded at an old house where an assailant begins picking them off one by one, in a fictional variation of John Foxe's classic book detailing Christian martyrdom through the ages.

A young comedy star on the rise, Cat Ce is live from Jimmy Kimmel’s Comedy Club in Las Vegas! Join Cat as she takes you on a hilarious journey of her misadventures as a Chinese American comedian growing up in Hollywood. Follow Cat from her early beginnings in La La Land, to her unsuccessful dating life, all the way to her comical turn at making skits on social media and becoming an international star. Listen to this uprising comedian tear up American comedy clubs with her Perfect Chinglish!
When down-and-out painter Li receives a magical magic wallet, he went from living in embarrassment to becoming rich overnight, and instantly stepped into a luxurious world of wealth.
Young tuba boy Christian Estevez finds himself under the thumb of a mysterious manager.
When what was meant to be a joyous day turns into a dark revelations; Anisola Williams is forced to confront her hidden past.

Film_title: Front 242: BLACK OUT - the Final Show Live at Ancienne Belgique 2025

Description: In 2055, Earth is collapsing. Environmental decay and societal collapse have pushed humanity to the brink of extinction. A group of survivors stumbles upon an ancient artifact that may hold the key to reversing the planet’s fate. But as they unlock its secrets, they realize it may also bring about something far darker. Racing against time, they must confront their fears and decide how far they’ll go to save humanity — or if it's too late. The End is a haunting journey into the unknown, exploring survival, morality, and the cost of redemption. Prepare for a mind-bending thriller that will challenge the very notion of hope.
Exploration into creator Heather Fraser's relationship with gender and genitalia through crude drawings and cruder musings

In the heart of the most notorious correctional facility, Black Hills, the walls echo with more than just despair-they tremble with the sounds of illegal fight matches. Inmates are pitted against each other by guards, who stream the brutal brawls.
Govind, lives in a village with his mother and wife, Jyoti. The family is preparing for the four-day Chhath festival, but tensions emerge as family members gather after 25 years.

Film_title: Mono - Forever Home: Live in Tokyo with Orchestra PITREZA
Description: Forever Home: Live in Tokyo with Orchestra PITREZA celebrates MONO’s 25th Anniversary ‘OATH’ Orchestral World Tour, which stretched to 20 concerts in Europe, Asia, and the United States of America in the final months of 2024. Recorded in front of a sold-out crowd at Spotify O-EAST in Tokyo, Forever Home features a 12-piece orchestra – led by orchestra director and frequent collaborator, Chad McCullough – supporting MONOas they perform their latest album, OATH, in its entirety.

Film_title: Hope Upon A Star - IRyS 3D Birthday Live
Description: ･ﾟ 💫💎 𝟥𝒟 𝐵𝐼𝑅𝒯𝐻𝒟𝒜𝒴 𝐿𝐼𝒱𝐸 💎 💫ﾟ･ ˗ˏˋMarch 16th, 12 PM JST 𝟛月𝟙𝟞日 𝟙𝟚ℙ𝕄　ˎˊ˗

Film_title: The Real Story of Karlos Nasar
Description: Since his childhood Karlos Nasar has dreamed of becoming an Olympic champion weightlifter for his home country of Bulgaria. Fuelled by a tumultuous upbringing rife with poverty, Karlos achieved his dream in the summer of '24. Now Karlos looks to do something no other Bulgarian has ever done before - win the European, Olympic, & World Championships in the same year. But can he do it?

It's that time of year again. A tight knit group of five friends attend their yearly reunion retreat. A tradition they have kept alive since high school. This year it's a hike into the beautiful woods of southwestern Ohio. After hiking just a few miles something unexpected goes horribly wrong bringing secrets to the surface of their lifelong friendships.

A young Navy Seal accompanies his Mother back to the Philippines where she lost her husband and first child during the height of a religious conflict 26 years ago, where the past comes back to haunt him.

Left in charge of his energetic grandkids, Mr Okafor faces more chaos than he bargained for. But as the little troublemakers turn his world upside down, they teach him about forgiveness, hope, and the true meaning of family.

Arie Hinkley has it all — a beautiful family, a husband who is about to be mayor, money, friends, the perfect life — until a stranger from her past returns to reveal a mysterious and disturbing past from Arie that not only threatens her husband Booker Hinkley's campaign but may very well ruin Arie's dream life.
When a census taker mistakenly receives a snuff film on his doorstep, he must risk his life to uncover a network of political corruption.

Film_title: Faith In The Family: The Spirit of Christmas
Description: Faith in the Family: The Spirit of Christmas explores the Andersons’ struggles with grief, faith, and healing during the holidays, culminating in a transformative Christmas morning.

Film_title: Naked as Created: The Pastor Jim Moore Story
Description: Pastor Jim Moore agrees to study nudism to argue against his hosts' nudist relatives, but his research leads him to embrace the nudist lifestyle, forever changing his life and beliefs.

Film_title: Guests Is The Title For Now
Description: A haunted young filmmaker seeks to disprove his professor's teachings through the making of his first movie.

Black Cake follows an Indo-Caribbean woman in Queens who's stuck in a routined life after the death of her mother. She's presented with an opportunity that could change her life, but it requires her to step away from her comfort zone to sell her mother's home.
A meditative series of twelve individual shots, each offering a quiet reflection on nature’s varied forms — capturing fleeting moments of stillness, texture, and light across shifting landscapes.

Film_title: Innocence & Cynicism:  The Snow Queen and Hayao Miyazaki
Description: A video essay by animation expert John Adkins included on Deaf Crocodile's blu ray release Treasures of Soviet Animation Vol 2

In a small Connecticut town, 17-year-old Alex inherits their late mother’s diner and must choose between keeping the family legacy alive or chasing their own dreams. A tender coming-of-age story about identity, responsibility, and the future.

A kidnapped woman pleads for freedom as her captor tells three chilling tales. These disturbing vignettes blend into the hostage's reality as she seizes an opportunity to fight back. But with each tale the kidnapper tells, it becomes clear that the lines between fiction, manipulation, and psychological torment are dangerously blurred.

A Doctor Who fan film about obsession, friendship, and the moment fandom goes too far. WHO-Ligans: The Lost Fandom is the feature film edition of the award-winning web series now re-edited with brand new scenes, tighter storytelling, and a fresh cut designed to showcase the full story like never before. Meet Russell and Billie, two lifelong Doctor Who obsessives navigating conventions, rivalries, and the never-ending hunt for the perfect collectible. But when Jodie, a sci-fi outsider, moves in, everything changes. What begins as a clash of fandoms spirals into something far stranger… because some stories refuse to stay fictional.
Trip to Bukhara city for Farhod's wedding.
A private investigator searches for a missing girl whose identity was stolen, uncovering dangerous secrets while racing against time. His own past emerges, endangering everything he's built.

'Stnic' - a band from Iowa City - boards a train in St. Paul, MN, en route to Portland, OR. They plan to perform on the train, as well as in America's 'weird' city. All thanks to the booking-work done by the band's leader.
Studios: Public Space One: Media Arts Co-Op

Description: A short film about high-functioning depression. The film follows Kara through her day as she hangs out with her friends and studies. Kara takes pride in her appearance and hides behind her mask of popularity and her persona of perfection. Throughout her day, her mask slips and cracks until a private breakdown sends her over the edge.

Susan Rice is proof that comedy gets funnier with age. With a no-holds-barred look at the trials getting older, she offers a hilarious perspective on dating, grooming, and even horseback riding in the silver years.
When a working man's wife is killed by an intoxicated, wealthy heiress and she gets off with no jail time, he follows her to her secluded cabin in the woods to exact his own justice.
Two teenagers find lost footage from a years old cold case -and unknowingly awaken old nightmares.

In the humdrum suburb of Shillyville, Ohio, a feud is escalating between the generations-old Mortadelli Family Funeral Home, led by lazy patriarch Vincenzo Mortadelli, and the innovative new Johnny Cobweb Funeral Parlor, founded by eponymous upstart Johnny Cobweb. Each business vows to do whatever it takes to win more customers, even as an unprecedented string of murders rocks their cartoonish world.

Goopy, a piano-playing dog, opens a mysterious box and is pulled through time onto a rocket sleigh. Landing in the past, he teams with a boy to rescue Santa from Frostwick and restore Christmas with the power of music and friendship again.

Film_title: Mozart: Don Giovanni @ Bavarian State Opera, Munich
Description: What if Don Juan were a woman? At the Bayerische Staatsoper in Munich, director David Hermann presents a bold and modernist reinterpretation of Mozart’s opera, elevated by the collective excellence of its cast.

Film_title: Blue: A Web of Spider-Man Story
Description: Peter Parker reminisces on a past love on Valentine's Day.
Two friends have a run in with an ancient creature of the woods.
Have you seen a killer in a pig mask? Well, Jess has. She has a nightmare about a killer pig that turns into a hellish reality.
A friend tries to pull a man out of a manic depressive episode after a tragic event

Film_title: Armin van Buuren b2b Indira Paganotto @ Sónar 2025
Description: Trance pioneer Armin van Buuren and psytrance queen Indira Paganotto meet on the decks for the first time. Armin van Buuren's fame is inseparable from his influential radio show A State of Trance but is also known for his killer festival sets across the world. Bringing that huge energy together with the hypnotic modern psy sounds of Indira Paganotta proves to be a genius move- stratospheric BPMs meet saturated beats in this wild debut b2b. Filmed on 14 June 2025 at Sónar in Barcelona.
A woman, coping with a decades-old loss, goes on a series of hikes and realizes she is being followed by a stranger

Film_title: Radio 2 in the Park 2025: Bryan Adams
Description: Canadian rock superstar Bryan Adams headlines Saturday night in Chelmsford at Radio 2 in the Park 2025. Featuring all the greatest hits alongside tracks from his studio album Roll with the Punches. Bryan has cemented his status as a global music icon with over four decades of hits, topping the charts in over 40 countries. He has received multiple music honours, including a Grammy, Juno Awards, a Hollywood Walk of Fame Star, plus Academy and Golden Globe nominations.
A celebration of the 60th anniversary of Thunderbirds.

Following her killer debut tour last year, the fearless, provocative, and very funny Ria Lina realises that she is ready to rebel. Expect a relentless stream of hilarity as Ria explores the delight of throwing life up in the air after years of following the rules.
Two missionaries from the Church of Latter-Day Saints begin to rob houses in upper-class neighborhoods.

It’s the swinging (16)60s, and ‘the merry monarch’ Charles II is on the throne. After violent civil war, England’s theatres have finally reopened and, for the first time, women are allowed to perform in public. In the West End, grande dame Mrs Betterton (Anna Chancellor) rules the roost. But there’s a new face in town: an orange-seller with dreams of stardom. From dressing-room camaraderie to bitter rivalry, April De Angelis’ gloriously exuberant, bawdily funny and deeply poignant play celebrates five women grabbing this newfound freedom and making their way in an unfamiliar world. But at what price?
Arthur begins to develop feelings for his new neighbor, Ateş. Before long, he realizes that he is in love for the first time.

An Asian filmmaker whilst making his last film in North America is taken on a journey of both romance and selfdiscovery as he tries to navigate a world in a state of flux, all the while seeking answers and closure in both his personal and professional life.
A blue-collar worker falls into a magical world and finds himself embroiled in a battle with a violent butterfly.

Film_title: Genesis - The Lamb Lies Down on Broadway (50th Anniversary Super Deluxe Edition)
Description: In Genesis' incredible body of work, 'The Lamb Lies Down On Broadway' is a landmark record, and one of the most influential progressive rock albums of all time. Originally released in November 1974, The Lamb is celebrating its 50th Anniversary with a 4CD + Blu-ray Super Deluxe Edition. This definitive compendium was created with input from all band members involved in the record and follows the arc of the album's creation and tour, giving fans a deep dive into the music and visual elements.
"F Friendships" is a poignant exploration of the complexities of human connection, highlighting the fragility of friendship and the resilience of the human spirit.
Short before Field of Screams
An Ex MIlitary Intelligence turn Priest

Film_title: A Note to My Young, Queer Self
Description: Queer Margate locals bravely shared short, heartfelt letters addressed to their younger selves in a celebration of the strength and beauty found in living authentically and the transformative power of sharing our stories.
STN’s 25th birthday party. Life from the vacoomfs lodge.
A lower class bartender makes a shady deal with a group of violent mobsters to afford the coming birth of his daughter.

Metamorphosis is a deeply personal, bittersweet memoir that peers into the psyche of a student caught in the relentless grind of competitive examinations. Through fragments of memory, confession, and quiet observation, the film unravels the inner battles waged in solitude—the sleepless nights, the weight of expectations, and the silent pain of repeated failures and small triumphs. As I chart my own journey through this unforgiving landscape, the film becomes more than just a chronicle of preparation. It is an intimate exploration of how these examinations, with all their pressures and promises, reshaped my understanding of hard work, success, and the fleeting nature of this world. Metamorphosis is not merely about reaching a goal—it is about the transformation that occurs in pursuit of one. It is about the boy who entered this race, and the person who emerged from it, forever changed.

An agama lizard finds the perfect excuse to exchange the boring and slow-paced life of the Hinterland for the fast-paced and success-paved streets of Lagos. With his band of music-loving friends, they set out on an arduous but event-filled adventure to make it big and conquer Lagos. Will they find success or redemption?

Film_title: Battle of the Sexes - Sabalenka v Kyrgios
Description: More than 50 years after Billie Jean King’s era-defining victory over Bobby Riggs captivated 90 million viewers, Aryna Sabalenka and Nick Kyrgios are set to reignite the battle of the sexes concept for a new generation.

At the Vienna Konzerthaus, the magical Christmas gala brings together Julie Fuchs and Ludovic Tézier to perform traditional carols. The programme includes Adolphe Adam's ‘Minuit chrétien’, ‘Les anges dans nos campagnes’ and ‘Entre le boeuf et l'âne gris’, followed by “Hallelujah” from Handel's ‘Messiah’.
A Black family of five struggles to survive zombie apocalypse and uncover the truth behind the outbreak.
Already harassed by the neighborhood bully for entering a hip-hop contest, two young brothers, who have never danced, have only three days to prepare and overcome the deep insecurity of one brother.
A renegade reporter uncovers a cardboard-laced conspiracy while pursuing a deadly political scandal connected to the local sanitation strike.

Punk documentary about queer Aboriginal and Indigenous artists and their inventions of the “good life”. Here you will meet artists who have remained in their Indigenous communities or have rediscovered them for themselves, and are active outside and beyond the Western art institutions: masters whose outstanding teachings on light are as precise as any mathematics available to the Western world; Aboriginal cultural workers who emancipated themselves solely through the power of their art; Amazonian curanderas who work miracles despite the shaman business, and others.

Film_title: Pu‘uwai Haokila: The Story of How Hawai‘i Shaped Modern Music
Description: Narrated by Raiatea Helm, this documentary uncovers Hawaiʻi’s deep, global impact on modern music despite the political struggles they faced at home.
After a chance encounter with a circus magician, the Famous Five set off to find the mysterious Eye of the Sunrise and keep it from falling into the wrong hands.
Kadhir, Jeeva, Krishna, Goutham and Kayal grapple with a demonic summoning in a search to make online content.

A modern-day African American journalist experiences a dual reality when wearing a mysterious locket - a forbidden dreamt romance with a white soldier in 1944 and a modern-day love with a white Civil Rights Attorney.

When first-time landlord Maurice finds himself financially devastated after being legally barred from collecting rent during the respiratory pandemic “VID-219” quarantine, he and his childhood friends, Cody and Sincere take matters into their own hands. Together, they create “Evicted” — a secretive dark web app offering unconventional eviction services to desperate landlords. This dark comedy explores the unexpected consequences of pandemic housing policies while delivering laughs through its increasingly wild eviction schemes and the cat-and-mouse game between tenants and the amateur eviction crew.

Film_title: Just Like the Good Ol' Days*
Description: Aspiring director Jax Mercier's debut short film follows a reunion of old high school friends that takes a turn for the worst after one of them seeks retribution for past transgressions of the other men.

Soundings is an expansive portrait of the deep ocean, confronting the intensifying attempts to begin the first-ever mining of seabed materials. It moves from intimate encounters between dancers and sea creatures to Indigenous ancestral narratives and the hand-drawn maps of the first ocean cartographer, Marie Tharp. The voices of Pacific activists, lawyers and scientists resonate throughout, reflecting the nuanced debates. A rolling transcript relays the latest meeting of the International Seabed Authority (ISA), where states are drawing up regulations for deep-sea mining, together with a public letter from the Republic of Nauru stating its intention to submit an application to mine.
An account of the life and death of S&R, a family-owned discount department store.

“Callie” is an emotionally gripping, character driven drama perfect for audiences craving authentic storytelling with heart and depth. This film explores the raw complexities of love, betrayal, and personal growth through the eyes of a young woman whose world is turned upside down.

Film_title: Frozen Jr: The Ranches Academy School Performance
Description: Live Recording of the Ranches Academy School Performance of "Frozen Jr.". A story of true love and acceptance between sisters, Frozen Jr. expands upon the emotional relationship and journey between Princesses Anna and Elsa. When faced with danger, the two discover their hidden potential and the powerful bond of sisterhood. With a cast of beloved characters and loaded with magic, adventure, and plenty of humor, Frozen JR. is sure to thaw even the coldest heart!
At the 2025 Bach Competition, 27 pianists from 13 countries are hoping to win over the jury and the public. The best three will face off in the final at a concert in Leipzig's Gewandhaus.

After years of silence from the original universe the initial fight took place in, Red and Blue find themselves thrown into another threat-riddled evening once again with their allies, but this time on a multiversal scale. Having to join forces with the heroes of different realms to defeat the faux-god that has plagued their shared history for years in a brawl to end their suffering once and for all.
Drama film about a sensitive topic.

A year-long investigation into the extreme far right exposes how hate and misinformation is being spread in communities and online. As one group fundraises for convicted racists and those jailed for their part in last summer’s riots, we reveal how some of their followers are calling for migrants to be killed if they refuse to leave the country.
Singer, multi-instrumentalist and composer Sona Jobarteh brings the sound of her kora to the jazz festival in Porquerolles.

Blues, gospel, jazz: Jon Batiste has been immersed in music since childhood. He played in his family's band, studied piano and went on to become a Master of Jazz at the Julliard School in New York. In Basel, he performed a piano and vocal repertoire: a resolutely contemporary return to his roots that has earned him seven Grammy Awards and an Oscar.
A spirit goes on a journey.
A tale of unrequited love told in front of the backdrop of modern technology.
A taxi driver grapples with a dark secret from his past, suppressed by his own fear and at the encouragement of his mother.
Landscape film on the junction of manmade waste and the landscape, objects mangled into the form and structure of the land. A film about autumn.
A Sri Lankan food documentary, chronicling the journey of Ōtepoti collective members to their suppliers and growers on the island.

A troubled man, Marcus, seeks redemption in a church but finds himself entangled in a dark web of crime and corruption led by Father Thomas, a priest with sinister secrets. As Marcus tries to escape his past, he becomes an unwitting pawn in a dangerous game of power, betrayal, and faith. With the help of Sister Maria, who harbors her own scars, and the relentless Agent Nyakundi, Marcus must decide whether to embrace his sins or expose the corruption within the holy grounds. But redemption comes at a cost-one that might claim his life.
Story of Yahushua based on the Apocrypha Bible

Film_title: Kaleo: In the Shadow of the Colosseum
Description: Experience the once-in-a-lifetime concert that electrified the ancient world. Icelandic rockers Kaleo, celebrated for their Grammy nominated music and electrifying live performances, deliver a historic show at the iconic Colosseum in Rome. Join the band as they perform their greatest hits, including "No Good", "All The Pretty Girls", and "Way Down We Go", in the shadow of this legendary monument. Filmed with stunning cinematography, the special captures the raw energy and intimate atmosphere of the performance. Witness the band's passion and connection with their fans as they bring their music to life in one of the most extraordinary venues on Earth.

Film_title: hololive English 3rd Concert -All for One- Day 1
Description: Day 1 of hololive English's third concert, held on August 23rd, 2025 at Radio City Music Hall and streamed online via Streaming+ and SPWN.
During the COVID-19 lockdown, a Woman and a Younger Man begin an affair to avoid the complications of their lives.

Ex-military officer Hakeem returns home to find his family is murdered. Hakeem embarks on a blood-soaked path of vengeance. The deeper he goes, the more he realizes the conspiracy is far greater than he imagined.

Dealing with troubling friends, a toxic home life and minimal motivation, Bryan (Bolanos) remains stuck in a lifeless cycle with no end in sight. That all changes once he takes a leap of faith outside of his comfort zone, when a new friend Bianca (Prokuski) shines a light at the end of the tunnel and introduces him to the world of art.

Film_title: The Legend of Nigel Kneale: The Creeping Unknown
Description: Who was Nigel Kneale? Toby Hadoke investigates the man and his influence
Kiki & Dee is a sexy love story of a woman who suffers from the mental health disorder, agoraphobia, after losing the love of her life.
Turkish pianist Büşra Kayıkçı moves ARTE Concert's Piano Day with the beauty of her neoclassical notes.

After failing to clutch up game 100 of Sierra Muskopf’s Seaport City 100 drops, ScratchAE needs to prove to himself that it was a fluke loss, that he’s still good, that the ever expanding landscape of the world and the microcosm of it that is "Fortnite" still has room for him. He figures there’s no better way to do that than land the original (better) Fortnite city, on the original (better) Fortnite map, as the kills rack up, so do the chances of his redemption.

Three souls are sent to Earth from the Parallel on an eternal mission to fulfill God's plan. They've come to guard and train Cyrus, a young mechanic who has lost his way in life, and they help him understand his calling.
An experimental thriller film by Ted McKean Newsom.
Jandek enters a purple room and gets down with his bad self.

When a high school gaming nerd's date with the cheer captain is interrupted by robbers invading his home, he must transform from virtual warrior to real-life hero, using his strategic gaming skills to outwit the intruders.

Film_title: My Absurd Journey of True Loves First Kiss and How I Became Mortal
Description: An immortal man searches for true love.

Film_title: Cristian Măcelaru & Julia Fischer  - Brahms, Debussy and Barraine
Description: Julia Fischer sublimates Brahms's Violin Concerto alongside the Orchestre National de France, conducted by Cristian Măcelaru. An eclectic programme that also highlights works by Elsa Barraine and Claude Debussy.

Three formidable women, Nia, Bella, and Dragon rise to power in the male-dominated realm of organized crime. This high-stakes gangster film explores a world where ruthlessness often determines who reigns supreme.

As part of the celebrations marking the 750th anniversary of Lausanne Cathedral, Hans-Christoph Rademann conducts a monumental work of sacred music: Georg Friedrich Handel's Messiah, first performed in 1741.
Lubiana presents Terre Rouge, her second album, to the Europavox festival audience. A bubble of sweetness carried by the sound of her kora.

In October of 2024, a young couple, Sydney and Jack, disappeared in the woods near the Hackney Marshes whilst camping and getting high. A gen Z hotspot for most, an ancient ritualistic burial ground to others.

A beautiful heiress recovering from a mental breakdown develops a special friendship with her nurse. But as their closeness grows, her ex-husband enters with a manipulative plan, a lurid tale of seduction and murder.
As love grows between a focused gymnast and adventurous dancer, a choice emerges for them both: should they cling to what they have or let go and reach for something greater.

Paulo Constantino in O Segredo Dos Djinn 2 (2025) A team of archaeologists return to the mountains of Kaf and find a medallion, which will cause the Guardian of Wishes to return to our world, to take his revenge on the ones who imprisoned him.
After creating a powerful liquid that grants superhuman abilities, a scientist races to keep it from criminals and prevent global disaster.

A group of outsiders on the autism spectrum strive to rise above their loneliness by building a community in the most unexpected of places – an elevator. Led by Andrew, the star of the elevator filming scene on YouTube, they use the magical multi-sensory experience of elevator riding to discover who they want to be and demand acceptance in a world that is not made for them.
A prospector encounters the pain that comes with sacrifice, toward something greater.

Leah is haunted by fragmented memories and crushing guilt. As she descends into a dark psychological journey, the lines between reality and her troubled past blur, forcing her to confront the chilling truth that has begun to consume her.
A previously unknown short by Gunvor Nelson, discovered in 2023 along with approximately 150 rolls of film in her apartment.
Unable to conceive a child and without work, Tom and Poppy Webster achieve unexpected notoriety making homage shorts. Fame, however, is not the prize, but the price.
A comedic micro short about a man's increasingly desperate attempts to open a stubborn parcel, only to find his worst nightmare.

Struggling rapper Cmills is desperate to help his mother overcome addiction while facing life's challenges. When she's diagnosed with cancer, he must decide: give up his music to support her or pursue his dreams to honor her legacy through his songs.
A three-day gathering on the Florida panhandle becomes a rollicking party of queer resistance, grief and joy in the face of increasing censorship and division.
This a Serious Romantic Drama From Bangladesh. Written By Dayal Saha. Acted By Yash Rohan & Tasnia Farin.
In a spoof of What Would You Do?, John Quiñones asks high school students what they would do.
A narrative short film.
A valet mix up initiates a fight for a cannabis grinder encoded with the elemental presentation of a botanical super formula worth millions of dollars.

Director: Peter Ganzinia, Ms. Vinyl et al
Description: A space rock band tries to escape an evil oppressor and make a new life elsewhere.
When Cinderella’s prized slippers vanish right before the royal ball, she and her fairy-tale friends must embark on a thrilling chase to find them.
A dark and twisty tale of a woman in distress on the side of the road and the handsome stranger who stops to help her.

Driven by poverty and rejection, brilliant but broken Yeni misuses his only chance to escape hardship. When his actions bring disgrace and loss, he must overcome guilt and regret to reclaim his purpose—a moving story of fall, faith, and redemption.

Honey, a shy 13-year-old, hides the truth about herself and her chaotic family, struggling to reveal her true self in her new class. She loves playing music - and she's really talented - but no one knows that yet. All Honey wants is a spot in Liam's band, "Rock Till We Drop". So, when she discovers that her supposedly dead, music-loving grandfather Marcel might actually be alive, she sets out to find him. Perhaps he's exactly what she needs to finally learn to stand up for herself.
An experimental film and work of performance art by Joel Davis Warren.
FEELING GREAT NO CRASHOUT NO BRAINROT ONLY QUESTION ILL TWEET ABT IT WHEN ITS OVER TIME AUDIO PLEAE WORK

Film_title: The New York Philharmonic Orchestra in Pyongyang Great moments in music
Description: That year, political tensions between the two enemy states had eased, and the aim was to deepen their cultural relationship. This event became a musical highlight, significant for the bond it forged between these two cultures.
Three friends take on the Cartel but one of them is playing a deadly love game with an old fling he must survive war to get her back.
After a scary diagnosis, Richelle decided it was time to see the world - as well as her online friends - before it's too late.
The Black Box is a slide lecture exploring, among other topics, more than a century of the history of online shopping. 124 slides, approximately one hour.
A mobster's daughter takes refuge in an old movie theater and finds herself in the middle of a magical story about fairies, divorce, and hope
When a private investigator falls in love with the woman he was hired to find, an endless stream of murder, mystery, and betrayal ensues.
A suspense drama about a woman who plots with her best friend to kill her husband so she can inherit his wealth, but the plan goes awry and involves betrayal.
a amateur short film shot on a Canon Rebel T1i about getting an ice cold beverage.
Jesus, history's most influential figure, transformed the world through his teachings. Explore his life from scholars who've dedicated their careers to studying him.
Two croissants are confronted with the grim reality of human barbarism
Four friends uncover a 235-year-old conspiracy at their school, revealing a new perspective on their town's history and its founders, the McKnights.
A great debate rages when a reserved British woman gets drawn into an unwanted conversation by a homesick American.

Laid Bare is a candid and emotionally charged solo show that delves into the life and career of the renowned entertainer. Known for his roles in Doctor Who, Torchwood, and Arrow, as well as his extensive work in musical theatre, Barrowman uses this platform to share personal stories, address past controversies, and showcase his musical talents.​ Recorded live on tour in Barrowman's home town of Glasgow.

Film_title: Stjepan Hauser plays Bach and Morricone @ Château de Neuschwanstein 2025
Description: At Neuschwanstein Castle in Germany, Croatian cellist Stjepan Hauser blends genres alongside the Munich Philharmonic Orchestra, conducted by maestro Ulf Schirmer. The soloist performs Bach's famous Air on the G String, the theme from The Godfather by Ennio Morricone, and music from the series Game of Thrones, composed by Ramin Djawadi.
After being released from jail, Remi aims to do the right thing until his criminal brother is kidnapped, forcing Remi back into his old ways.

Film_title: The Ugly Duckling: Wild Goose Chase
Description: The 2nd installment of The Ugly Duckling films by Tristan Bennett of Bennett Studios. Plot TBA. Set to release in 2026.
A young Irish recruitment agent must navigate the challenges of his job and the temptation of emigration as he tries to decide whether to stay in Ireland or start a new life abroad.

UNFINISHED BUSINESS is a gripping, character-driven drama about a veteran reporter’s quest to expose the truth behind a legendary politician’s reign on Beacon Hill. Set against the scenic backdrops of 1980s Boston and modern-day Martha’s Vineyard, it is a tale of political power, personal redemption, and the price of blind ambition. It is a David and Goliath story — a hero’s story, a spiritual story — for our time.

The Coolangatta Gold, a punishing endurance race scripted as part of a 1980's romantic film, originating from the sport of surf lifesaving. Ali Day, the greatest ironman of all time, aims for his tenth title but his body is older and a field of competitors are desperate to beat him, including the young gun Conner Maggs.

When three estranged friends are reunited for a bachelorette party, they decide to try a designer drug called Gush. But will Gush help them open up to each other, or will it open something much deeper in their minds?

An American girl in Thailand has a secret romance at a hidden waterfall with a local fisherman boy. Her father rips her away from the boy, but 10 years later, she returns to Thailand in search of a person and a place she once lost as a kid.
Ivy is a Gen Z private eye. She vapes. She takes Jell-O shots. And this next case might be her last.

Two investigators enter an abandoned apartment to uncover what happened to a missing team, only to find cryptic warnings and a mirror that distorts their sense of reality. As one of them becomes transfixed by his reflection, they realize something far more sinister may be lurking within.

The story of the friendship between Dudung, an orphan who lives with his grandmother, Grandma Romlah, and Kasniza, the little girl who is the daughter of Grandma Romlah's employer. Kasniza, who never knew her grandparents, found the grandmother she missed in Grandma Romlah. Dudung, who knows that his grandmother has a dream of seeing the Kaaba, is assisted by Kasniza in his efforts to make this dream come true. However, in their efforts, they both experienced many trials, and Kasniza also had to deal with bullies at school. So how will their efforts end, will Grandma Romlah's dream of seeing the Kaaba be achieved?

Three women, each trapped in a marriage that has lost its spark, find themselves drifting into a world of temptation when they discover No Strings, an untraceable dating app built for discreet encounters but what they find is more than they bargained for.
Four college friends reunite for a weekend birthday trip, illuminating old emotions and igniting new connections.

An artist encounters a series of mysterious events that alter his perception of reality and uncovers a conspiracy involving a prophetic celestial event that will alter the consciousness of all living beings.

When Detective Sarah takes in her troubled teenage niece Emily, she discovers a dark family secret: Emily carries the curse of the Blue Moon. As the full moon rises, Sarah is forced into a dangerous world of bloodlines, betrayals, and supernatural forces that threaten to tear them apart. Howl of the Blue Moon is a haunting supernatural crime drama that explores loyalty, sacrifice, and the thin line between humanity and the monster within.

In the winter of 1960, small-town piano teacher Lucy Lay enters the Rich family, believing she has come for a simple tutoring job. She soon discovers the position is only a façade, and with no way out, she is pressed into the family’s arrangement to disguise herself as a princess from a mysterious nation and marry the family heir. Inside the hush of that vast winter manor, desire gathers like heat beneath ice. The secret she uncovers binds them in ways neither can escape. What begins as confinement becomes a dangerous pull that reshapes the course of her life.
"Common Sense" is a gripping urban thriller that follows the intense journey of a resilient protagonist named ATL as he navigates the perilous streets of Atlanta.
Mistress Maggie Peach shows her employee who's boss.

A wave of brutal murders in Accra sparks panic and unrest. Investigators trace the victims to British networks. Under pressure, Ghana sends two elite N.I.B. officers, armed and authorized, to London to confront a deadly conspiracy.

Director: Teddy Bell, Jamie Howard et al
Description: An anthology movie that tells the story of a painting in an art exhibition that has the mysterious ability to inspire an emotional reaction out of anyone who views it, but the chaos this courses starts to have an effect on the gallery’s straight-laced curator who demands only perfection.

When a mysterious virus breaks out, 17-year-old Elijah Notch (Givan Onuaguluchi-May) is left alone in a time forever changed. With only his pet cat by his side, Eli must navigate the horrors of a world beholden to each remaining man and prove that there can still be good, even in a world on fire.

The Tecmo Bowl Documentary is a deep dive into the world of the classic NES video game TECMO BOWL and how it has changed the lives of both the elite players who love it and the NFL players themselves as they prepare to compete for the world title in April 2022.

Film_title: Jordan Rakei - Live From The Royal Albert Hall
Description: Recorded over his 2 sold out night at London's historic Royal Albert Hall, this career spanning set features some of his earliest works through to his most recent album 'The Loop'.

Film_title: Confidence Man: Live From 3Olympia Theatre, Dublin
Description: We join Confidence Man at the 3Olympia Theatre, Dublin for the final night of their sold-out UK and Ireland tour. Taking place on 10th December 2024, the show rounded out what was a monumental year for the Australian dance-pop duo, celebrating their third album 3AM (La La La).
This is the Ugandan Commados movie from the director Professor Artman Kalourz of Zaiper man. Casts company 'Iron Borne Stars' Watch out Trapped Under Mission.

The Hip-Hop Orchestra Experience celebrates the fusion of hip-hop and classical music, featuring a 28-piece orchestra, rappers, funky drums, a turf dancer, and a soprano, as they transcend cultural divides and redefine the future of concert music.

Now a global benchmark for blending medieval sounds with contemporary music, Faun began in 1999 in Gräfelfing, in the western suburbs of Munich. The Bavarian band has always remained faithful to its “pagan folk” roots and even attempted to qualify for Eurovision in 2015! Their twelfth studio album, entitled “Hex,” is scheduled for release in September. A great way to get us in the mood.

A poker game leads a struggling writer and determined PI to discover a sinister government plot. As they dig deeper into the conspiracy, they face mounting pressure to reveal the truth before disaster strikes.

Film_title: Julia Leshneva & Franco Fagioli Bayreuth Baroque 2025
Cast: Orchestre de l’Opéra Royal de Versailles
Description: Soprano Julia Lezhneva and countertenor Franco Fagioli present an exceptional evening. The programme features arias and duets by the great masters of the Baroque: Purcell, Corelli, Handel, Graun and Porpora, Haydn and Farinelli's Italian master, but also Handel's great rival. Passionate arias, high-pitched vocalises, virtuosity and sonic exuberance: A real treat!

Film_title: I STOLE AN ALIEN BABY! (or, Lamentations on the Nature of Youth)
Description: A group of friends go camping, hoping to have one last trip together before they have to grow up and join the scary world of adulthood. However, their trip is cut short when something crash lands in the woods.

Kienyeji tells the story of two university students, Cynthia and Charlie, from conflicting Kenyan communities who fall in love and plan to marry despite their families' opposition. The narrative explores tribalism and cultural differences as their attempts to unite face challenges, including a failed ruracio due to unpaid dowry, food poisoning at a second attempt, and ultimately, divorce pressured by Charlie's father. Amid exams, financial struggles, and personal setbacks, their journey unfolds with Ohangla and Mugithi music, raising questions about love and tradition. Will love triumph, or will societal pressures prevail?
Isaiah Parker is doing everything he can to nurture and care for his family, but worlds collide when a beautiful stranger comes into town, things become more than what he bargained for.

Bobby hires a handyman to fix a clogged pipe in her aging home, expecting a quick and simple repair. But as the work begins, strange things start to happen-and it becomes clear the problem runs deeper than plumbing. The creepiest bathroom horror since Psycho.

An old hermit, living with his ducks in the woods, is kidnapped for not conforming by the state's children's army. In prison the old man undergoes a torturous re-education by fierce classical musicians. A courageous fellow prisoner heals him with love and they attempt an escape.

Film_title: Gonzalo Rubalcaba, Chris Potter, Larry Grenadier and Eric Harland Jazz sous les Pommiers 2025
Description: Jazz sous les Pommiers welcomes Gonzalo Rubalcaba, Chris Potter, Larry Grenadier and Eric Harland, four heavyweights of North American jazz reunited for the first time as part of the First Meeting project.
Callan Kicks the Year dips through all the maddest moments in Ireland and abroad in 2025.
When everything seems impossible, Alex, a screenwriter, goes on a journey inside his head in search for inspiration and self discovery.
A young man runs away from home after accidentally killing his abusive father. Cal meets Travis. An imaginary friend who guides him through an unforeseen path to insanity.

Film_title: Death is Little More Tour Documentary
Description: A documentary of the band boundaries tour.

Loyalty is everything-until it turns deadly. After a gang shooting leaves a woman dead, Tia is blackmailed into murder to protect her best friend, Mel, one of the shooters, while hiding the truth from her sister, Detective Dana Barnes.
Frankie lies. Frankie remembers an unfortunate event from his past and how it spiralled into the state he’s in now, with a little help from an old friend.
a film by omid ghafari & amirhossein ghafari

Seventeen months after walking away from the chaos, former Peacekeeper Blake Field lives in the shadows, trying to outrun a violent past that refuses to die. But peace was never built to last. When Grace and Jane arrive on his doorstep, they bring a grim warning: Isaac has returned; stronger, smarter, and ready to finish what he started. With the last remnants of the Peacekeepers in Isaac’s crosshairs, Blake is pulled back into a war he never wanted to fight again. As old loyalties are tested and blood is spilled, Blake, Grace, and Jane must face the enemy who tore their world apart and make their final stand. The lines between justice and revenge blur as the battle intensifies, and redemption may come at the highest cost. In this explosive conclusion to the trilogy, everything leads to one final reckoning.
When a young man falls hard for an alluring, married older woman, he soon finds his life escalating into a chaotic cycle of cheating, lies, harassment, and murder.

Film_title: Birthday Concert for Arvo Pärt The Estonian Philharmonic Chamber Choir with Tõnu Kaljuste
Description: Arvo Pärt has succeeded in using musical means to plant the spirituality of Eastern Europe in Western musical consciousness and make modern classical music accessible to a wide audience. He turned 90 on 11 September 2025.
A rap artist known as Hundred tries to leave his past behind him in favor of a more safe and comfortable lifestyle, but the violence of his old life follows him and his family.
Years after the death of Boune, the Guardians of Society are thrown back into action, to stop the impending multiversal crisis.
Paranormal investigators explore the serial killer John W. Gacy's house, seeking ghosts—only to face terrifying forces. By morning, none survive. What they unleashed was far more than they expected.

After humanity’s destruction, only Ted remains alive, condemned to endure the sadistic torture of AM. Isolated in a world without hope, he desperately searches for a way to escape that eternal torment. A fan-made short film, adapted from Harlan Ellison’s short story I Have No Mouth, and I Must Scream.
Babo Lo, a dangerous gang leader, disguises himself as a Bangladeshi junk dealer, modeling himself after crime legend Pablo Escobar.

On June 14 and 15, 2025, in the Pierre Boulez auditorium, the Philharmonie de Paris welcomed the acrobats of the Australian company Circa for their show En masse, a creation combining contemporary circus and classical music—the fiery tale of a fallen civilization and its rebirth, carried by great pieces from the repertoires of Franz Schubert and Igor Stravinsky. German tenor Hans Jörg Mammel, an accomplished interpreter of the Austrian composer, sang several excerpts from the Lieder, while pianists Tanguy de Williencourt and Thomas Enhco, virtuosos of the young French scene, performed a duet that captured all the cataclysmic verve of The Rite of Spring.
Studios: Cité de la Musique – Philharmonie de Paris

Description: Through the stories of three iconic art spaces - The Waiting Room, 1588 Barrington, and the Bus Stop Theatre - this documentary explores the process of urban change in Halifax and the individual efforts required to preserve space for community and expression.

Film_title: Xtimacy: a BDSM Exercise Between Mothers
Description: This short film documents two single mothers and professional sex workers reclaiming female archetypes: the mother and the whore, beyond patriarchal constraints. They invite the viewer into a bondage session to redefine their intimacy and motherhood. It serves as an artistic and political endeavor to break down the boundaries of traditional motherhood and celebrate their radical friendship.
The Lost Leatherface, a brand new interview with actor Brett Wagner to celebrate The Texas Chainsaw Massacre 4K release

Set against the gritty yet vibrant backdrop of Charm City, Baltimore Hustle is a powerful ensemble drama that captures the heartbeat of a city built on resilience, loyalty, and the unbreakable will to rise.
Short film created as part of the 48 Hour Film Project.

The Hawthorne Society and Eternity Box Films welcome you inside the mind of Nathaniel Hawthorne. "The Blithedale Romance" is his most personal and revealing novel. Based on his experiences at Brook Farm and his personal relationships with Herman Melville and Margaret Fuller, the novel reveals Hawthorne's secret desires.

Erica Stateland; a Medal of Honor recipient, suffering from survivors guilt, is hired to coach Marc Beckham; a "cancelIed" actor to play a war hero in the comeback movie of his career. The unlikely relationship that unfolds is a testament to the equalizer that is grief. It's a story about being human and learning that the highest form of courage can come, not from what you've done, but who you choose to be as a result of it.

A series of short films that create an anthology of stories that will be interlinked to create a feature film. These stories in turn are linked to the 2019 film Lucas and Albert and the follow-up film Babysitters.
A female humming bird named Papyrus, wanted to explore the world , but her dad doesn't want her to do it. So Papyrus went out on a journey when she came across a male hummingbird named Pico.

A mysterious gift appears at Luna and Eli’s doorstep on a stormy night, wrapped with no sender—only a chilling message: PLAY ME. What starts as an eerie curiosity spirals into a nightmare as an unseen force pulls them into a twisted game. The rules are unclear. The stakes? Deadly. And as the night unfolds, unwelcome guests make it clear—once you press play, there’s no way out. Some secrets should stay buried. Some games should never be played.
